programme.title: The Onion Movie
programme.desc: Satirical interpretations of world events and curious human behavior.

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: Amanda Schull and Morgan David Jones star in Steve DiMarco's romcom about an ambitious journalist who discovers the target of her big news story is at the same yoga retreat as her.

programme.title: Forever in my heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs - back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: Amanda Schull and Morgan David Jones star in Steve DiMarco's romcom about an ambitious journalist who discovers the target of her big news story is at the same yoga retreat as her.

programme.title: A King In New York
programme.desc: A recently-deposed European monarch from a fictional country seeks shelter in New York where he becomes an accidental TV celebrity. Before long he is accused of being a Communist. (Charlie Chaplin)

programme.title: Blackbeard
programme.desc: The true story of Blackbeard the Pirate, the most infamous and fearsome seafarer of them all.

programme.title: Blackbeard Part Two
programme.desc: In 1717, Royal Navy Lieutenant Robert Maynard is sent to the West Indies on a secret mission to destroy notorious pirate ship The Queen Anne's Revenge and its crew.

programme.title: Murder in the Vineyard
programme.desc: After moving from the city to a quaint suburban town, a womans daughter inexplicably becomes the target of bullies. Can they uncover the towns dark secret?

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: When Dr. Hillary Spenser saves the life of Gregory Lipton, he becomes dangerously obsessed with her, threatening the good doctor and all those in her life.

programme.title: Francesco
programme.desc: The life of St. Francis of Assisi from rich man's son to religious humanitarian.

programme.title: Lawless Range
programme.desc: Brothers, Sean and Tommy Donnelly live and work in modern day Texas. Tommy has always been troubled and Sean has always been there to help him, but when Tommy gets himself $6,000 in debt.

programme.title: Clementine
programme.desc: Reeling from a one-sided breakup, heartbroken Karen breaks into her ex's lake house. There, she strikes up a complicated relationship with provocative younger woman Lana.

programme.title: Tell Me Your Name
programme.desc: After a troubled childhood, Ashley searches for a connection, and unknowingly invites in a demonic force, which leaves her loved ones fighting for her soul.

programme.title: Dead Ant
programme.desc: When the 1989 glam-metal band "Sonic Grave" embark on a trip to Coachella in hopes of a comeback, their peyote trip pit stop in Joshua Tree incites a viscous attack.

programme.title: Angel And The Badman
programme.desc: An injured gunslinger is nursed back to health by a Quaker. When his violent past comes back to haunt him, he has to choose between her way of life and his own.

programme.title: The Quake
programme.desc: After surviving The Wave, Kristian Eikjord and his family find themselves at the center of an earthquake. Kristian makes a perilous attempt to help his family and others escape a crumbling skyscraper.

programme.title: Eruption: LA
programme.desc: A screenwriter teams up with a scientist and a movie star to save Los Angeles from volcanic eruptions.

programme.title: Meteor Assault
programme.desc: A disgraced scientist has to use cutting edge satellite technology to save the world from being destroyed by a rogue asteroid. Starring Mark Lutz and Anna Van Hooft (2015).

programme.title: Absolute Zero
programme.desc: (2006) Apocalyptic action with Jeff Fahey and Erika Eleniak. When a shift in Earth's polarity plunges the planet's equatorial regions into a new Ice Age, a desperate race for survival is ignited...

programme.title: Cold Zone
programme.desc: After finding frozen animals in the woods, a scientist must try to stop an apocalyptic bout of global freezing.

programme.title: Arctic Blast
programme.desc: A brilliant physicist must save the world when a solar eclipse triggers a new ice age.

programme.title: 10.0 Earthquake
programme.desc: As L.A. is torn apart by a series of earthquakes, a scientist and an engineer race to divert the epicentre of an impending super-quake, potentially saving millions. Stars Henry Ian Cusick

programme.title: The Quake
programme.desc: After surviving The Wave, Kristian Eikjord and his family find themselves at the center of an earthquake. Kristian makes a perilous attempt to help his family and others escape a crumbling skyscraper.

programme.title: A Lonely Place to Die
programme.desc: A group of mountaineers in the Scottish Highlands discover a kidnapped girl and are pursued by her captors.

programme.title: House of the Witch
programme.desc: A group of high-school kids set out to play a Halloween prank at an abandoned house, but once they enter they become victims of a demonic witch who has set her wrath upon them.

programme.title: Slaughter in San Francisco
programme.desc: A Chinese-American cop, skilled in martial arts, battles the most powerful criminal gang in San Francisco that is responsible for the death of his partner.

programme.title: Hangman
programme.desc: The Miller family returns from vacation to find that they have been the victims of a break-in, but, while trying to move on, they discover that their nightmare has only just begun.

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: While travelling in continental Europe, a rich young playgirl realizes that an elderly lady seems to have disappeared from the train.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E.
programme.desc: Isabel Sullivan, who's fifteen, has just moved to a small town to live with her Uncle Paul, who is the town's Mayor. Isabel has recently lost her parents in a car accident.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E. 2 : Mission Impawsible
programme.desc: In this sequel, the super intelligent artificial robotronic dog, Archie, befriends Gregory, a young boy who is the son of a carnival owner.

programme.title: In the Dog House
programme.desc: A divorced woman's kids and dog set out to sabotage her dating life. They are successful until her high school sweetheart shows up and a battle ensues to sway their mom's heart back to their father.

programme.title: Lassie Come Home
programme.desc: Remake of the 1943 movie based on Eric Knight's book Lassie Come Home.

programme.title: Somewhere in Time
programme.desc: Get swept away by one of the most beloved romances ever in this powerful story of a writer (Christopher Reeve) who sacrifices his life in the present to find love in the past.

programme.title: These Foolish Things
programme.desc: A struggling young actress, a fledgling director and an ambitious playwright become embroiled in an emotional love triangle as they strive for recognition.

programme.title: Dreamchild
programme.desc: Ian Holm stars as the children's author Lewis Carroll in a touching fantasy-drama set in 1930s New York, featuring amazing special effects creatures from Muppet creator Jim Henson.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, three friends are swept into a whirlwind of wealth and glamour when one of them is mistaken for a British heiress.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: High-powered lawyer Clair Kubik has her world turned upside down when her husband, who she thought was Tom Kubik, is arrested and revealed to be Ron Chapman, an ex-Marine accused of murder.

programme.title: Made in America
programme.desc: Grown-up comedy. When Nia takes a blood test at school, she finds her mum (Whoopi Goldberg) has deceived her and that her father is a politically incorrect car salesman (Ted Danson).

programme.desc: A mother, willing to do anything to get her daughter back, exposes the complex powers of seduction of Allison and Keith, as well as the mental and physical abuse inflicted on her daughter.

programme.title: Coyote Bar

programme.title: Coyote Bar
programme.desc: Violet Sanford moves to New York. She wants to become a famous composer. But he ends up in despair and penniless. He then decides to get a job as a bartender at the hottest bar in town - the «Coyote Bar».

programme.title: Deadly Secrets

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Shaun Murphy and Dr. Alex Park treat two patients who have collapsed at the local airport and whose symptoms point to an infection that may begin to be transmitted through the air. programme.title: Are you sure?
programme.desc: Lisa's life, a high-level athlete, loses meaning when she is released from the team. George, a businessman, is wrongly accused of a tax crime. And it's when everything seemed to fall apart in both of their lives, that the two met!

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget, a 32-year-old Londoner, decides that the time has come to change her life. Over the next 12 months you will have to lose weight, stop smoking and drinking, find a “handsome and sensitive” fiancé and change jobs. During the process, he writes everything down in a diary...

programme.title: Dressed for Wedding
programme.desc: Jane is a romantic and independent woman who has been a bridesmaid 27 times! Her fairy tale seems far from coming true, until her little sister wins the heart of Jane's boss, with whom she is secretly in love.

programme.title: 28 Dias
programme.desc: Gwen lives to have fun and goes beyond all limits. The problem is that she doesn't know when to stop... As a result of her (many) crazy acts, she is forced to spend the hardest 28 days of her life in a recovery clinic.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER IN GREEN PERIGORD. Tourtoirac, summer 2022. A series of murders disturbs the tranquility of this small village in Périgord Vert. The same modus operandi is repeated: the victims are decapitated.

programme.title: Murder in...
programme.desc: MURDER AT PARIS OPEN. As a prestigious clay court tournament approaches, Manon Picard's lifeless body is found on the court. Who could want to hurt this young tennis promise?

programme.title: A Taste of Death: A Mystery by Hannah Swensen
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Hannah Swensen when her mother, Delores, finds the lifeless body of a homeowner—a regular customer at The Cookie Jar—while searching for a home for her sister Michelle.

programme.title: Doomsday Mom: The Lori Vallow Story
programme.desc: It is based on the true story of Lori Vallow, who gained national attention when her children, JJ and Tylee, were reported missing from their Idaho home in the fall of 2019.

programme.title: Carrot Cake Murder: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: A skeleton found in Lake Eden reveals the true identity of a beloved resident. Despite her fiancé's disapproval, Hannah investigates the murder and enlists her mother's help to uncover the truth and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Son of a Gun
programme.desc: Young JR is accused and imprisoned for a minor crime. When he enters prison he discovers the harshness of life in prison, but he will soon become the protégé of Brendan Lynch, one of the most dangerous prisoners in Australia. However, that protection will have a price and Lynch, along with his team, will have plans for JR when he is released from prison: help them with their escape plan.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Filmed entirely in the Philippines, "Platoon" tells us about the year a young university student named Chris spends in a regiment, who decides to volunteer for the Vietnam War. First part of a trilogy directed and written by Oliver Stone about the Vietnam War (followed by Born on the Fourth of July and Between Heaven and Earth). The protagonist of this story is a young Charlie Sheen, accompanied by a cast among which we highlight Willem Dafoe, Tom Berenger or some at that time still unknown Forest Whitaker or Johnny Depp. "Platoon" was the first film about Vietnam written and directed by a veteran of that war. Oliver Stone created this masterpiece taken from the experiences that he himself lived on the battlefield in his year as a soldier, filming almost a documentary where he tells us in first person through a character named Chris all his experiences in Vietnam. We are thus witnessing one of the most precise and realistic war films that recount this conflict with excellent direction, a script and impeccable editing. As for the exteriors, they are very well detailed and this perfection makes the viewer quickly immerse themselves in the war atmosphere that surrounds everything without rest. Definitely, a spectacular film that shows what until then Hollywood always tried to hide and the best way to get closer to what those days in Vietnam really were. Classic of the eighties and universal cinema.

programme.title: the whole truth
programme.desc: Tom is accused of having murdered innocent civilians in El Salvador, fifteen years ago, in a secret military operation. His wife, Claire, is ready to discover the whole truth...

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker is a shy young student. He has never had much confidence in himself and although he is very intelligent, except for his best friend, the rich Harry Osborn, he has no friends. He has been in love with his beautiful redhead neighbor for years: Mary Jane, but he would never find the courage to propose to her. Meanwhile, he lives in a small neighborhood in the New York borough of Queens with his Uncle Ben and Aunt May. His life will change forever when, during a visit to a laboratory, a radioactive spider bites him, causing changes in him that at first seem frightening but will soon make him feel as if he had spider superpowers: he has colossal strength, he can climb walls and ceilings and he can also create spider webs with his hands. With his new powers, Peter becomes more daring. He no longer needs glasses and has acquired muscles that make him very attractive. At school he saves Mary Jane from falling in the cafeteria and accidentally throws food at a bully named "Flash." When he is about to hit him, Peter manages to neutralize him and impresses his friends and the girl of his dreams. To try to win him over, she lies to her Uncle Ben by saying she is going to the library but actually entering a wrestling contest for $3,000. With the money he intends to buy a second-hand sports car for Mary Jane. But when he wins the fight he discovers that the manager does not intend to pay him. Snubbed, he goes out to the street to find his uncle dying on the ground: a thief has shot him to take the car. In his arms, the one who was like a father to him dies. Peter will now become "Spiderman" and use a costume to take revenge on criminals who destroy families like his. Soon his first enemy will appear: The Green Goblin. The Green Goblin was chosen as the villain of this film since director Sam Raimi felt that the father-son duel would make the film more interesting.

programme.title: Shark, revenge
programme.desc: Years pass and Ellen Brody continues to live in Amyty. Her sons, Sean and Micahel, no longer work at Sea World and her husband passed away some time ago due to cardiac arrest. Currently, Sean is the city's police officer. On Christmas night, he receives the order to go to the beach to unscrew a log from a buoy. In the process he is eaten by a great white shark. Convinced that the sharks have some kind of vendetta against her family, Ellen travels with Michael, his wife and daughter to a house they have in the Bahamas. What Ellen and her family don't know is that the threat has followed them there. The film's main tagline, 'This time it's personal', was parodied in 'Back to the Future II'. In the film you can see a poster for the fictional 'Jaws 19', directed by Max Spielberg and whose slogan is 'This time it's very personal.' This phrase has ended up becoming a cliché in movies with many sequels. Actor Michael Caine could not attend the Oscars and collect his award for 'Hannah and Her Sisters', because he was filming this film at that time. The water in the tank in which the film's climax was shot was filled with blue dye, so Micahel Caine and Lorraine Gary ended up with their hair completely dyed this color. Lorraine Gary was nominated for Best Actress at the United States Academy Awards for Science Fiction, Fantasy and Horror.

programme.title: Mystery in the Florist: Nipped in the bud
programme.desc: Accused of a murder she did not commit, a former lawyer turned florist must solve the crime to clear her name and discover the truth.

programme.title: Moneyball, breaking the rules
programme.desc: The Oakland Athletics just lost again to the New York Yankees in the 2001 post-season. With their main stars, Johnny Damon, Jason Giambi and Jason Isringhausen leaving for another team, it will be the responsibility of their manager, Billy Beane, to find a solution. On a visit to Cleveland, Beane will meet Peter Brand, a young economics specialist from Yale who has a series of radical ideas about how to enhance the value of each player. As proof that he is right, Peter gives him the keys to why Billy failed when he played in the professional league. Convinced that what he says is true, the manager decides to hire him to completely turn his team around. But this new statistical method provokes terrible controversy. The players don't believe in him and neither do the team's shareholders. Instead of relying on each person's experience, character, or intuition, Billy ranks them based on their base percentage (OBP). Thus, he hires players with a very high OBP but with a series of characteristics that terribly undervalue them: one cannot run, another is too old... But the confrontation and controversy are too broad and now Beane will have to face a losing and demoralized team, an overexcited Peter, the team managers who do not believe in him and an entire country that believes that you cannot play that way. During pre-production on Moneyball, cinematographer Adam Kimmel was arrested for crimes related to sexual harassment and possession of illegal weapons and explosives. He was replaced by Wally Pfister. This is the first movie about baseball to be nominated for an Oscar since "Field of Dreams," twenty-two years earlier. In the film, Billy Beane refers to John Poloni as "Rocco." This is a reference to Jack McGee's father, who played in minor league baseball and whose nickname was "Rocco."

programme.title: The debt collector 2
programme.desc: A pair of debt collectors suddenly find themselves involved in a highly dangerous situation in which they try to hunt down several criminals while fleeing from a gangster.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Sweet Molly Wright has a life-changing experience as a child; Help an alien who is being sought by two agents of the MiB organization escape. Twenty years after what happened, and after much physical and intellectual preparation, she manages to present herself as a candidate to join the CIA and the FBI, but no one believes her story and she is rejected for her delusions with alien life. Despite this, Molly does not give up and manages to track down an alien landing that leads her directly to the MiB headquarters in New York City. His adventure begins from that moment, he leaves life as he knows it behind and becomes a testing agent for the MiB branch in the city of London. The tenacious and cunning Molly has to prove her abilities to stay in the MiB. To do this, he manages to get involved in a difficult mission as the assistant of the presumptuous Agent H. Both agents will have to iron out their rough edges and work as a team to solve two serious problems; the appearance of a mole that would call into question the impeccable reputation of the MiB and the threat of two alien beings that endangers life on Earth and the balance of the universe. Men in Black: International is a new installment of the famous Men in Black franchise. It becomes the fourth film and spin-off of the original MIB saga. It stars Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson and much of its filming took place in the cities of New York, Morocco, Italy and London. The actor and producer Felix Gary Gray was in charge of directing this film.

programme.title: They call him Bodhi
programme.desc: The FBI suspects that a group of surfers are responsible for a series of bank robberies, so they send agent Johnny Utah to infiltrate them. Utah manages to gain their trust by participating in the extreme activities they engage in and befriends Bodhi, the group's leader. Utah is becoming more integrated every day and will soon have to decide between his obligations as a member of the FBI and his loyalty to Bodhi.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Manhattan, New York. After almost thirty years without hearing from them, the ghosts and demons have once again escaped from the underworld to destroy the city. This time a new team of Ghostbusters, made up of a group of four women, is ready to put an end to any spectral threat.

programme.title: The Kaiser's Last Kiss
programme.desc: A German officer is sent to Holland to determine whether the British Secret Service has infiltrated the home of Kaiser Wilhelm II, during the start of World War II, but begins a dangerous and lethal romance with a young Dutch Jew with consequences neither of them could have foreseen.

programme.title: Night of Vengeance
programme.desc: Vincent is a divorced man with a teenage son, Thomas, with whom he barely has a relationship. He works as a police officer in Los Angeles, dealing with corrupt matters hidden from Internal Affairs. After a heist in which he steals a shipment of cocaine from a dealer in Las Vegas, Vincent and his partner Sean Cass volunteer to investigate the case in order to hide their guilt and involvement from Internal Affairs. One afternoon when Vincent is walking with his son, the group of criminals from whom he stole cocaine corners him and kidnaps Thomas, threatening to end his life if he does not return the drugs. The leaders of Internal Affairs suspect Vincent and decide to investigate him. He only has one night to get his son back safe and sound, return the drug shipment, hide the truth from his ex-partner and cleanse his image in front of the heads of Internal Affairs.

programme.title: The beginner
programme.desc: After the murder of his partner, Agent Pulovski (Clint Eastwood), a veteran police officer with a bad temper, will begin working with rookie Ackerman (Charlie Sheen), a young man with emotional problems who is beginning to learn about the profession. Pulovski will try to apprehend the murderers of his former partner, a powerful organization dedicated to the theft and resale of luxury cars. Despite the initial conflicts, both must be understood to locate the brain of the organization.

programme.title: The big shark (Jaws 3)
programme.desc: Third sequel born as a result of Spielberg's famous film "Jaws". When a baby white shark ends up trapped in a water park, the owner decides to use it as a lure to attract more customers. What is not expected is that the mother, an adult shark measuring more than 35 feet, will go looking for him and begins to kill bathers indiscriminately. Mike Brody, the adult son of Police Captain Brody, who killed a killer shark ten years ago, will try to take down the terrifying beast.

programme.title: Shark
programme.desc: Summer vacation has arrived in the small resort town of Amity Island. While the city council is in charge of making the place a wonderful and entertaining place for tourists, a great threat is approaching, endangering the safety of bathers. The police chief, Martin Brody (Roy Scheider), receives a tip about the disappearance of a young woman on one of the beaches. When they search the terrain, the young woman's dismembered body is found buried in the sand. The coroner's first resolution is that the girl was the victim of a shark attack. The police chief prepares to close access to the beaches but is intercepted by the Mayor. Brody argues with him until the coroner intervenes again and assures that his first conclusion was incorrect, and that the girl died in a terrible accident when she got caught in the propeller of some boat or ship. The police officer resigns and accepts the Mayor's "recommendation." A horde of tourists arrives on Amity Island that same day. While on Chief Brody's watch, a boy is killed by the shark and the truth becomes impossible to hide. A shark hunting specialist named Quin (Robert Shaw) offers his services in exchange for being the only one to receive the entire reward. Anyway, seeing the ferocity of the attacks, Brody asks for help from a marine biologist, Matt Hooper (Richard Dreyfuss), who identifies the shark attack as that of a white shark, one of the most dangerous. Quin, Brody and Hooper will try to hunt the feared animal together before someone else is hurt. The film's soundtrack is composed by John Williams, a highly successful composer who also created the soundtracks for the most renowned films by Steve Spielberg and George Lucas. Among them are those of "Schindler's List" and "Star Wars", in addition to the main theme of the "Harry Potter" saga. The film is based on a novel by writer Peter Benchley.

programme.title: Corruption in Miami
programme.desc: Ricardo Tubbs (Jamie Foxx, Best Actor Oscar for "Ray") and Sonny Crockett (Colin Farrell) are two undercover police officers from Miami (Florida). Ricardo is intelligent, calm and enterprising, while Sonny has his own way of doing things, although always staying close to the law to avoid problems. Their latest mission is to find out the whereabouts of Arcángel de Jesús Montoya (Spanish Luis Tosar, Goya for Best Actor for "Celda 211"), the leader of a gang of drug traffickers, whose men seem to be responsible for a series of recent murders. Writer and director Michael Mann updates the famous series that he created in the 1980s with this elegant thriller, which stands out for its visual splendor, the raw atmosphere it recreates and the excellent action scenes. Chinese actress Gong Li also appears in the cast.

programme.title: Mystery at the Florist: A suspicious burial
programme.desc: When a body appears at her cousin's wedding, a former lawyer florist sets out to investigate a crime that hides family secrets and unexpected dangers.

programme.title: the whole truth
programme.desc: Tom is accused of having murdered innocent civilians in El Salvador, fifteen years ago, in a secret military operation. His wife, Claire, is ready to discover the whole truth...

programme.title: Spider-Man

When he is about to hit him, Peter manages to neutralize him and impresses his friends and the girl of his dreams. The Green Goblin was chosen as the villain of this film since director Sam Raimi felt that the father-son duel would make the film more interesting.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is a top secret government agent with a license to kill who decides to quit his job when he finds and marries the woman of his dreams. But happiness is short-lived, since they have put a price on his head. He doesn't know who is after him, but he knows that there are several murderers and that it could be anyone. His neighbors, his friends, former colleagues, his current co-workers... Spencer will team up with his wife to find out who the mysterious characters are who want him dead before the bullies finish them off... and their marriage!

programme.title: Invictus
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of the book "Playing the enemy" by John Carlin. In 1990 Nelson Mandela became President of his country, after having been released from prison. One of his most important measures was the abolition of apartheid. He intended to achieve reconciliation between the black and white populations. It was in 1995 when he used the Rugby World Cup in South Africa as an instrument to achieve national unity.

programme.title: Beauty and the beast
programme.desc: Adaptation of the story of Beauty and the Beast. When Bella's father is shipwrecked, she is exiled to the countryside. The land belongs to the kingdom of the Beast, from whom he steals a rose and is sentenced to death. Belle sacrifices herself for her father and goes to live in Beast's castle. There he will investigate the secrets that surround its owner and discover that he was a prince. True love will arise between them without expecting it.

programme.title: The source of life
programme.desc: An odyssey about a man's fight to save the woman he loves in three time spaces: the 21st century, the conquest of America, and the future.

programme.title: my sister's husband
programme.desc: Richard is a Cambridge professor who will find himself involved in an unexpected love triangle. After getting a young and attractive American student pregnant, he will also meet her sister, an eccentric novelist.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Robert Trench, an undercover DEA agent, takes advantage of gunman Michael Stigman's idea of ​​robbing a bank to get a mob boss out. However, the plan turns out to be exceedingly satisfactory when they get much more money than anticipated and, in addition, Trench's forces do not block their exit. To complicate things a little more. Stigman turns out to be a Navy Intelligence agent who shoots Trench and takes all the money. Soon, a confusing loop will begin in which both forces of the American army will pursue both Trench and Sitgman in a corrupt and dirty plot to each keep the profits. And without anyone expecting it, both Trench and Sitgman discover that they have to work together to be able to survive their own bosses and assault groups and to finally emerge victorious. During the development of the film, Vince Vaughn was going to play Bobby and Owen Wilson was going to play Stig. Also, as a curiosity, in the film's trailer you can hear the song "Die by the drop" from 2010 by the band The Dead Weathers. This song had previously been used in the trailer for Contraband (2012), which also featured Mark Wahlberg and was directed by Baltasar Kormákur.

programme.title: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: When a Russian satellite in orbit around Earth threatens to fall onto the planet, NASA looks to the engineer who designed it to fix it before it enters the atmosphere. Frank Colvin, a former Air Force pilot, was the one who designed the device forty years ago. He was about to travel to space but they finally decided to do without him, truncating all his dreams of being an astronaut. Reluctantly, Frank accepts the mission to travel to space, but on the condition that his team, the one from forty years ago, accompany him on the mission. After some grueling tests, Frank Colvin, Tank Sullica, Jerry O'Neil and Haw Hawkins travel into space to fix the satellite. But when they reach the point where they must carry out their mission, they encounter some more difficult problems than expected. In the film, the four astronauts appear together on 'The Tonight Show with Jay Leno.' To promote the film, the four actors also went to this program. NASA offered the production its 'vomit comet' plane, used to create the state of weightlessness. Clint Eastwood rejected the offer for fear that the elderly actors would become too ill to work. The four actors pretend to be the same age in the film, seventy years old. In reality, the youngest is Tommy Lee Jones, who at the time of filming was only fifty-four years old.

programme.title: The client
programme.desc: Mark Sway is an eleven-year-old boy who witnesses the death of a mafia lawyer. Before dying, he confesses some very important information to him. But, fearing retaliation, Mark doesn't dare tell the FBI. The FBI pressures Mark to reveal the lawyer's last words, but he, aware that the mafia is watching him, decides to hire a lawyer to protect him. Adaptation of the best seller of the same name by John Grisham, directed by Joel Schumacher (''A Day of Fury'', ''Batman Forever''). Its plot starting point is vaguely reminiscent of that of ''Sole Witness'', although the Mormon community that surrounded Harrison Ford in Peter Weir's film is replaced here by a single character: that of a devoted lawyer. For this reason, the true core of the film, despite being a thriller, is not the judicial plot, but the relationship established between the boy, played by Brad Renfro (chosen from 5,000 candidates), and his lawyer, a role entrusted to Susan Sarandon, for which she was nominated for an Oscar for best actress. Tommy Lee Jones gave life to the third party, in the shoes of an ambitious prosecutor.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: During the escape after committing a robbery, the van in which four thieves intend to escape is shot at by the police and bursts into flames.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Filmed entirely in the Philippines, "Platoon" tells us about the year a young university student named Chris spends in a regiment, who decides to volunteer for the Vietnam War. First part of a trilogy directed and written by Oliver Stone about the Vietnam War (followed by Born on the Fourth of July and Between Heaven and Earth). The protagonist of this story is a young Charlie Sheen, accompanied by a cast among which we highlight Willem Dafoe, Tom Berenger or some at that time still unknown Forest Whitaker or Johnny Depp. "Platoon" was the first film about Vietnam written and directed by a veteran of that war. Oliver Stone created this masterpiece taken from the experiences that he himself lived on the battlefield in his year as a soldier, filming almost a documentary where he tells us in first person through a character named Chris all his experiences in Vietnam. We are thus witnessing one of the most precise and realistic war films that recount this conflict with excellent direction, a script and impeccable editing. As for the exteriors, they are very well detailed and this perfection makes the viewer quickly immerse themselves in the war atmosphere that surrounds everything without rest. Definitely, a spectacular film that shows what until then Hollywood always tried to hide and the best way to get closer to what those days in Vietnam really were. Classic of the eighties and universal cinema.

programme.title: Shark
programme.desc: Summer vacation has arrived in the small resort town of Amity Island. While the city council is in charge of making the place a wonderful and entertaining place for tourists, a great threat is approaching, endangering the safety of bathers. The police chief, Martin Brody (Roy Scheider), receives a tip about the disappearance of a young woman on one of the beaches. When they search the terrain, the young woman's dismembered body is found buried in the sand. The coroner's first resolution is that the girl was the victim of a shark attack. The police chief prepares to close access to the beaches but is intercepted by the Mayor. Brody argues with him until the coroner intervenes again and assures that his first conclusion was incorrect, and that the girl died in a terrible accident when she got caught in the propeller of some boat or ship. The police officer resigns and accepts the Mayor's "recommendation." A horde of tourists arrives on Amity Island that same day. While on Chief Brody's watch, a boy is killed by the shark and the truth becomes impossible to hide. A shark hunting specialist named Quin (Robert Shaw) offers his services in exchange for being the only one to receive the entire reward. Anyway, seeing the ferocity of the attacks, Brody asks for help from a marine biologist, Matt Hooper (Richard Dreyfuss), who identifies the shark attack as that of a white shark, one of the most dangerous. Quin, Brody and Hooper will try to hunt the feared animal together before someone else is hurt. The film's soundtrack is composed by John Williams, a highly successful composer who also created the soundtracks for the most renowned films by Steve Spielberg and George Lucas. Among them are those of "Schindler's List" and "Star Wars", in addition to the main theme of the "Harry Potter" saga. The film is based on a novel by writer Peter Benchley.

programme.title: Corruption in Miami
programme.desc: Ricardo Tubbs (Jamie Foxx, Best Actor Oscar for "Ray") and Sonny Crockett (Colin Farrell) are two undercover police officers from Miami (Florida). Ricardo is intelligent, calm and enterprising, while Sonny has his own way of doing things, although always staying close to the law to avoid problems. Their latest mission is to find out the whereabouts of Arcángel de Jesús Montoya (Spanish Luis Tosar, Goya for Best Actor for "Celda 211"), the leader of a gang of drug traffickers, whose men seem to be responsible for a series of recent murders. Writer and director Michael Mann updates the famous series that he created in the 1980s with this elegant thriller, which stands out for its visual splendor, the raw atmosphere it recreates and the excellent action scenes. Chinese actress Gong Li also appears in the cast.

programme.title: Absolute power
programme.desc: Luther, a specialist in grand thefts, plans to rob the mansion of a tycoon who is on vacation in the Caribbean. However, the victim's wife appears unexpectedly.

programme.title: The agent
programme.desc: In the year 2030, the world is in a permanent state of economic recession and faces serious environmental problems as a result of global warming. All those citizens who are unproductive are exiled to a colony.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Upon returning from a mission in Mombasa, elite soldier Ray Garrison and his wife are kidnapped and murdered. Shortly after, Ray awakens in the Spirit Reborn Project facility with no memory of his past.

programme.title: The flight
programme.desc: Commander Whip Whitaker is forced to make an emergency landing of the aircraft he is piloting, thereby saving many lives. He is considered a hero, until the subsequent investigation reveals that he had used narcotics the night before the incident. The pilot faces a trial in which he must put his career and his own life in order.

programme.title: run like a girl
programme.desc: The true story of Michelle Payne, the first female jockey to win the Melbourne Cup. An inspiring story of effort, family, friendship and courage in the face of the impossible.

programme.title: hidden figures
programme.desc: As a child, African-American Katherine proved to be a mathematical prodigy. Now, as an adult, she works for NASA... but in the USA of 1961, as a woman and black, her brilliant work means very little.

programme.title: The Smuggling Business: Undercover
programme.desc: Over the past two years, tens of thousands of migrants have crossed the English Channel in small boats from northern France, despite repeated promises by successive governments to stop the trade. This undercover BBC investigation reveals how people smuggling gangs are operating in plain sight inside a migrant camp in Dunkirk. It exposes a highly organised criminal marketplace driven by fierce competition between rival groups, who enforce control over the settlements through fear, violence and intimidation. The film examines efforts by UK authorities to disrupt and dismantle the criminal networks profiting from the crossings, and questions whether those measures are keeping pace with the scale and sophistication of the operation. BBC investigative reporter Josie Hannett also travels to Crowborough, where opposition to a new asylum seeker accommodation site has turned the town into a flashpoint in the national immigration debate. She asks whether current government policy is likely to deter future arrivals, or whether the UK is preparing for a future that will require many more such sites across the south east

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: Rachel explores this quirky vibrant Spanish city taking in its creativity as she indulges in a traditional chocolaty breakfast and finds a kitchen with a modern take on tapas. Rachel is particularly inspired by the Spanish sweet doughnut churros and by the city's food market. Back home in London, Rachel cooks up savoury churros with a roasted red pepper dipping sauce and some chocolate and fig truffles.

programme.title: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Reports of sexual assault and harassment on trains and at stations are on the rise, but victims say CCTV cameras are often broken or of such poor quality that their attackers can't be identified. We follow British Transport Police officers and staff as they race against time to gather the crucial evidence they need to bring offenders to justice.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: A global, topical weekly show that lifts the hood on the entertainment and news business. The Media Show explores the companies and personalities who command our attention, and how our perception of the world is shaped by their actions. From the streaming giants who entertain us, to the news outlets and social media platforms that inform and enrage us, The Media Show explains how the industry really works.

programme.title: The Travel Show
programme.desc: The traditional French bistro is mounting a comeback. In recent times, an average of 25 a day have been shutting their doors, as eating habits change across France. Now though, efforts are underway to save them. Briony May Williams travels through the south of the country to find out what this casual form of dining has brought to French culture. She heads to a village that's finally about to reopen a bistro that it lost many years ago, and explores the rowdy breakfast culture of Lyon's Machon cafes.

programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: A new Netflix documentary follows the final stage of Rafael Nadal's tennis career. The series is the latest high-profile sports documentary made for a streaming platform. Zachary Heinzerling, director of Rafa, outlines how the film was made and the level of access his team received. Minal Modha, senior research director at Ampere Analysis, provides context on the growing business of sports documentaries. In Scotland, Peter Murrell's guilty plea to embezzling funds from the SNP has renewed attention on the reporting that first raised questions about the affair. John Ferguson, political editor at the Sunday Mail, reflects on his own journalism. Laura Kuenssberg explains how she secured the first broadcast interview with Nicola Sturgeon since her estranged husband’s conviction. CBS News is facing upheaval following changes in leadership and the departure of several senior figures. The latest developments centre on the dismissal of veteran correspondent Scott Pelley after public criticism of the network's direction. Michael Grynbaum, media correspondent at The New York Times, outlines the story.

Kasih Tak Santai
programme.desc: Kemal dan Ranti, sepasang kekasih yang rupawan dan trendi. Ketika Kemal berkunjung ke rumah Ranti, ayahnya dan ibu Ranti yang sama-sama sedang puber kedua, menunjukkan tanda kasmaran. Akankah ini berdampak buruk untuk Kemal?

programme.title: Ku Tambal Hatimu Dengan Cinta
programme.desc: Olin, gadis tomboy yang berniat bekerja di Jakarta setelah lulus SMA. Dia bertemu Ucok dan bekerja di bengkel miliknya. Tapi Bams membeli lapaknya, dan Ucok diusir. Peristiwa itu membuat Olin bermusuhan dengan Bams.

programme.title: Kesengsem Tukang Sedot WC
programme.desc: Dika, seorang tukang sedot WC yang tampan, yang terlibat masalah dengan atasan barunya, anak perempuan pemilik perusahaan yang ditugaskan untuk menyelidiki dugaan penyelewengan dana perusahaan.

programme.title: Salon Madam : Rambut Api
programme.desc: Seorang wanita datang ke Salon Madam untuk mengecat rambutnya dan mempercantik penampilannya, tapi cantik itu luka, dan rambutnya bisa menjadi petaka membara jika tak digunakan dengan bijak.

programme.title: Married Failed
programme.desc: Jack, pencuri yang sedang menjadi buron. Suatu ketika ia merampok sebuah rumah dan mengambil satu peti mewah. Ia mengira itu adalah peti yang memuat perhiasan serta uang banyak, namun ternyata isinya benar-benar di luar dugaan.

programme.title: Silat Boy The Series 4
programme.desc: Untuk keempat kalinya Indonesia kalah dari Malaysia di Kejuaraan Asia Tenggara. Mada, Ken dan Mpok Yagi berusaha mendaftarkan tim Indonesia untuk pertandingan berikutnya. Namun, mereka harus mencari lima anggota.

programme.title: Kr. Amat Tikar Rogosukmo Shop
programme.desc: Tikar Rogo Sukmo adalah selembar tikar yang bisa menyembuhkan orang sakit. Tikar ini bukanlah tikar sembarangan. Setiap orang yang sembuh setelah memakainya akan langsung dengan sukarela memberikan seluruh hartanya.

programme.title: Kasih Tak Santai
programme.desc: Kemal dan Ranti, sepasang kekasih yang rupawan dan trendi. Ketika Kemal berkunjung ke rumah Ranti, ayahnya dan ibu Ranti yang sama-sama sedang puber kedua, menunjukkan tanda kasmaran. Akankah ini berdampak buruk untuk Kemal?

programme.title: Jodoh Di Ujung Jari
programme.desc: Rio, cowok tampan playboy kampus, banyak cewek-cewek terpikat oleh Rio. Rio punya empat pacar dan harus bisa mengatur waktu dengan keempat pacarnya. Apakah akan berjalan dengan mulus?

programme.title: Toko Kr.Amat Bantal Mimpi Indah
programme.desc: Marina mendapatkan bantal dari toko KR. Amat. Bantal ini punya khasiat jika digunakan saat tidur maka waktu bisa diputar kembali. Segala sesuatu yang menyangkut masa lalu dapat terulang kembali dan apapun yang diinginkan terwujud

programme.title: Janda Janda Jagoan
programme.desc: Maya, Anggi, dan Sindy adalah tiga perempuan jagoan yang berstatus janda. Mereka menjadi incaran penjahat. Vina, anak Anggi diculik oleh penjahat itu. Dapatkah tiga jagoan ini membebaskan Vina?

programme.title: Sunan Ampel and Nyi Ageng Manila
programme.desc: Sunan Ampel datang ke desa Kembang Kuning. Untuk meredakan perseteruan Ki Bangkuning dan Ki Wiryo atas sebidang tanah, dia menanam singkong di tanah tersebut, dan setelah dipanen singkong tersebut ternyata menghasilkan emas.

programme.title: Pejantan Tanggung 02
programme.desc: Akhirnya keempat sahabat ini kembali bersatu dan melupakan kejadian di masa lalu. Ketika mereka saling terbuka tentang perasaan mereka, persahabatan mereka pun dipertaruhkan.

programme.title: Dari Merpati Turun Ke Hati
programme.desc: Darso, cowok ceplas ceplos yang hobi main burung merpati. Darso kelimpungan ketika burung merpatinya hilang. Tak dinyana merpatinya hinggap di rumah Ayu, gadis cantik yang dijodohin ayahnya dengan Bimo. Darso menuduh Ayu.

programme.title: Koin Kekebalan
programme.desc: Rangga, pemuda lemah yang sering diganggu temannya, Teddy. Suatu hari Teddy mengganggunya dan melemparnya ke comberan dan Ranggga menemukan koin tua yang berkilau. Setiap Rangga memegang koin tersebut, tubuhnya menjadi lebih kuat

programme.title: Cinta Lutung Kasarung
programme.desc: Rara yang culas dan ambisius kecewa ketika Sari terpilih sebagai pewaris utama Prabu. Rara bersekongkol dengan Indra untuk menyingkirkan Sari dengan memberinya ramuan yang membuat kulitnya bersisik dan bersembunyi di hutan.

programme.title: Kalau Cinta Jangan Muna
programme.desc: Tito dan Erin sudah menjalin hubungan selama lima tahun. Erin ingin merayakan anniversary, namun tiba-tiba Tito memutuskan hubungan begitu saja tanpa alasan yang jelas. Keadaan berubah ketika Erin mengalami kecelakaan dan amnesia

programme.title: Kalau Cinta Jangan Muna
programme.desc: Tito dan Erin sudah menjalin hubungan selama lima tahun. Erin ingin merayakan anniversary, namun tiba-tiba Tito memutuskan hubungan begitu saja tanpa alasan yang jelas. Keadaan berubah ketika Erin mengalami kecelakaan dan amnesia

Sunset
programme.desc: Saat mobil yang ditumpangi sejumlah gadis berpapasan dengan mobil yang ditumpangi beberapa pria, Ching Li dan Paul Chin Pei jatuh cinta. Namun, kisah cinta mereka tidak berjalan mulus.

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Aksi kepahlawanan dan kisah asmara mewarnai film seni bela diri klasik ini. Saat Shaolin dikhianati oleh Pertapa Alis Putih, Fong Sai Yuk sang prajurit pemarah bersumpah untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: Ling Yun berperan sebagai pemain pengganti yang disewa oleh sebuah band populer setelah pemain drum mereka yang egois mengundurkan diri untuk bergabung dengan band saingan mereka.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxer
programme.desc: Petinju Tai Chi nan hebat, Ku Ting, menyembunyikan keahliannya dengan bekerja sebagai pekerja konstruksi. Namun, saat para preman menyerang kekasihnya, ia akhirnya menggunakan kung fu guna mengalahkan musuh-musuhnya.

programme.title: The Cave Of Silken Web
programme.desc: Bagian ke-3 dari film Journey To The West produksi Shaw Brothers ini mengikuti perjuangan para jagoan kita saat dijebak oleh 7 siluman laba-laba penggoda, yang bertekad untuk meraih keabadian dengan memakan para biksu!

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: The Water Margin karya sutradara Chang Cheh merupakan film seni bela diri paling epik, diangkat dari legenda nyata tentang 108 pemberontak yang hidup di gunung dan mampu berkali-kali mengalahkan serbuan tentara Sung.

programme.title: Dead End
programme.desc: Saat Chang Sun memberikan tumpangan pada Wen Jou yang tengah tersesat, ia langsung jatuh cinta. Namun, Chang harus memperjuangkan cintanya karena kakak Wen, seorang gangster bernama Wen Chiang, tidak menyukainya.

programme.title: The Bride From Hell
programme.desc: Idola tahun '70-an, Hsing Hui dan Yon Fan, membintangi film horor yang bercerita tentang pengusaha muda yang menikahi wanita muda nan cantik tanpa menyadari jika sang gadis dirasuki oleh iblis.

programme.title: Portrait In Crystal
programme.desc: Di film fantasi seni bela diri ini, jenderal Teng Wei Hao curiga bahwa sebuah lukisan kristal telah dikutuk dan menyebabkan beberapa pembunuhan. Ia mengutus anak buahnya untuk menyelidiki pencipta lukisan itu.

programme.title: Forbidden Tales Of Two Cities
programme.desc: Urusan asmara dan moral di era modern hanyalah segelintir masalah dari cerita yang berlatarkan Makau ini. Kisah cinta antara empat anak manusia menjadi cerita utama dalam kisah humor ini.

programme.title: My Rebellious Son
programme.desc: Seorang pejabat korup berusaha mencuri patung Buddha nan sangat berharga dari kuil untuk menyenangkan sekelompok orang dari Barat. Dokter Zhang dan putranya berhasil mengalahkan musuh dan menyelamatkan patung itu.

programme.title: Tragic Commitment
programme.desc: Selama lima tahun, Alex menjalani pernikahan bahagia dengan istrinya Tung, seorang ginekolog. Saat Alex terluka parah dalam sebuah kecelakaan, ia merasa harus memberitahu Tung tentang perselingkuhannya dengan Blackie.

programme.title: Five Elements Ninjas
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda ahli bela diri merencanakan aksi balas dendam terhadap seorang ninja yang telah membunuh guru dan saudara seperguruannya.

programme.title: The Jade Faced Assassin
programme.desc: Melodrama laga yang bercerita tentang pejuang wanita yang membesarkan putra musuhnya. Sementara itu, saudara kembar sang putra dibesarkan oleh musuh sang pejuang agar pada akhirnya kakak beradik itu akan saling membunuh.

programme.title: The Jade Faced Assassin
programme.desc: Melodrama laga yang bercerita tentang pejuang wanita yang membesarkan putra musuhnya. Sementara itu, saudara kembar sang putra dibesarkan oleh musuh sang pejuang agar pada akhirnya kakak beradik itu akan saling membunuh.

programme.title: The Happy Trio
programme.desc: Li Ching aktris terbaik di era nya berperan sebagai Ah Chiao adalah seorang gadis dari desa yang tersesat di kota, yang berteman dengan seorang pemondok yang baik hati dan seorang mantan aktor.

programme.title: Dirty Ho
programme.desc: Wang adalah pangeran ke-11 yang menyamar sebagai ahli barang antik demi menyembunyikan identitas aslinya. Ia merasa menemukan pria yang tepat untuk membantunya saat bertemu seorang penipu cerdas bernama Dirty Ho.

programme.title: Love Without End
programme.desc: Penyanyi Qing Qing dan arsitek Tang Peng Nan adalah pasangan serasi. Ia mengorbankan dirinya untuk membantu Peng Nan pada saat keluarganya mengalami kesulitan. Namun, mereka putus karena kesalahpahaman.

programme.title: Pursuit Of A Killer
programme.desc: Demi mewarisi kekayaannya, Fei menyewa seorang pembunuh untuk membunuh sang ayah yang ia benci. Namun, saat mengetahui bahwa saudara perempuannya adalah sang pewaris, Fei juga ingin membunuhnya.

programme.title: Beyond The Great Wall
programme.desc: Wang Zhao Jun tak mau menyuap seorang pelukis kekaisaran sehingga si pelukis menggambar potret jelek dirinya, yang membuatnya tak dipilih oleh Kaisar sampai mereka bertemu langsung.

programme.title: Swordsman At Large
programme.desc: Para bandit, gadis cantik dan ahli pedang bertarung untuk bertahan hidup dalam kisah menarik tentang penipuan, pengkhianatan dan kematian ini.

programme.title: The Deadly Breaking Sword
programme.desc: Prajurit Tuan Chang Qing bertemu wanita penghibur Liu Yin Xi di sebuah kota kecil. Liu meminta Tuan untuk membunuh Guo Tian Sheng, yang dikenal sebagai 'Dokter Pembunuh', untuk membalas kematian tunangannya.

programme.title: The Younger Generation
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah tragis tentang seorang gadis yang menikah dan memiliki 5 anak. Setelah ia dan sang suami meninggal, salah seorang anaknya terpaksa menjadi PSK untuk menafkahi keempat saudaranya.

programme.title: The Fighting Fool
programme.desc: Meng Yuan-wen akan berhadapan dengan Kuan Feng dalam film saga Wushu yang penuh kehebohan tentang sebuah galah berharga yang memiliki rahasia besar.

programme.title: Raw Passions
programme.desc: Seorang istri yang setia menguak sebuah jaringan pemerasan dan penipuan setelah suaminya ditipu oleh seorang penari perut yang licik. Saat sang penari ditikam, keadaan pun menjadi semakin tak terkendali.

programme.title: The Shepherd Girl
programme.desc: The Shepherd Girl, drama musikal tahun 1963 karya Shaw Brothers! Di film ini, Julie Yeh Feng berperan sebagai Hsiu Hsiu, gadis penggembala cantik yang jatuh cinta pada pelaut tampan bernama Liu Ta-lung.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Inilah kisah tentang kepolosan dan kegembiraan masa-masa remaja. Dua sahabat tumbuh bersama, namun persaingan muncul ketika mereka mengenal pria!

programme.title: Scandal
programme.desc: Saat berandalan Zhen dan sahabatnya Chia mengumpulkan bukti-bukti korupsi para pejabat, mereka menuntut untuk menjadi gubernur di negara itu.

programme.title: Scandal
programme.desc: Saat berandalan Zhen dan sahabatnya Chia mengumpulkan bukti-bukti korupsi para pejabat, mereka menuntut untuk menjadi gubernur di negara itu.

programme.title: The Dragon Missile
programme.desc: Sima bekerja untuk tuan Qin yang menderita penyakit mematikan dan hanya bisa disembuhkan oleh ramuan khusus. Qin mengirimnya dalam sebuah misi untuk mendapatkannya dan bertarung dengan senjata pamungkasnya, Rudal Naga!

programme.title: Young Lovers
programme.desc: Seorang anak dari keluarga kaya yang gemar bermain gitar bernama Yang Fan pergi ke Jepang untuk bergabung dengan sebuah band rock. Ia juga berusaha mendapatkan cinta dari dua gadis cantik.

programme.title: The Master
programme.desc: Gao, murid dari ahli seni bela diri Shi. Suatu hari, ia secara tak sengaja menyelamatkan musuh tuannya, Jin, hingga ia mengajarinya seni bela diri nan unik sebagai balasannya. Namun, Master Shi mengira Gao berkhianat.

programme.title: The Land Of Many Perfumes
programme.desc: Biksu Tang San Zang, siluman kera, siluman babi, dan Sha Wu Jing berada di Womanland, tempat para wanita melahirkan bayi perempuan dengan meminum mata air ajaib.

programme.title: That Man In Chang-An
programme.desc: Kaisar Han meninggal dan Permaisuri Lu merebut alih kekuasaan. Ia merencanakan untuk membunuh pewaris takhta, Liu Heng. Namun, prajurit bertopeng mengetahui rencana jahatnya dan memberi tahu Liu.

programme.title: The Dream Of The Red Chamber
programme.desc: Film yang diadaptasi dari novel Dinasti Ching nan populer, kisah cinta yang menyentuh ini terbukti menjadi tantangan bagi banyak sineas film. Kombinasi klasik dari sastra abad ke-18 dan pembuatan film tahun 1960-an.

programme.title: The Singing Killer
programme.desc: Chiang Yi diperas untuk melakukan pencurian perhiasan oleh mantan bosnya yang mengancam akan mengungkap masa lalunya yang kelam. Masalah muncul saat ia mengetahui bahwa cinta pertamanya bekerja di toko itu.

programme.title: Tiger Killer
programme.desc: Setelah membunuh seekor harimau, Wu Sung mendapat kenaikan jabatan, namun ia malah terjebak dalam cinta segitiga yang tragis antara saudaranya yang buruk rupa dan istri saudaranya yang mencoba untuk menggodanya.

programme.title: Killer Constable
programme.desc: Ketua Pengadilan Chan Koon Tai sungguh berdedikasi. Loyalitasnya yang berlebihan membuatnya mengejar seorang pencuri sadis yang bertekad untuk menghabisi anak buah Chan.

programme.title: A Friend From Inner Space
programme.desc: Shek Kin, yang biasa berperan sebagai tokoh jahat, mengambil peran langka di film komedi tentang hantu lucu yang berteman dengan seorang anak lelaki dan membantu sang anak menyatukan kembali orangtuanya yang berseteru.

programme.title: Murder Plot
programme.desc: Saat merencanakan pembalasan terhadap Huan yang kejam, istri Shen Lang mengacaukan konferensi dan harus diantar pulang. Dalam perjalanan pulang, mereka terjebak dalam perangkap Huan yang mematikan.

programme.title: We Love Millionaires
programme.desc: Tiga gadis pramuniaga cantik asal Hong Kong pergi ke utara untuk menyamar sebagai orang kaya dan mewujudkan impian mereka untuk menikahi pria kaya.

programme.title: To Kill A Mastermind
programme.desc: Sebuah sindikat kejahatan nan kejam, klan Qi Sha, yang dikendalikan oleh tujuh ketua, meneror Tiongkok. Pengadilan Kekaisaran memerintahkan Menteri Yang untuk menghancurkan mereka dengan mengirimkan mata-mata ke sana.

programme.title: The Lady Professional
programme.desc: Lily Ho berperan sebagai wanita penggoda dalam film thriller kontemporer Shaw Brothers ini. Berlatar di Hong Kong dan Jepang, film ini bercerita tentang Ho yang menyadari jika dirinya menjadi target pembunuhan.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Seorang fotografer terjerat oleh sesosok 'wanita berbaju merah' hingga menyebabkan kerabatnya tewas satu per satu. Ia pun bersumpah untuk mencari tahu kebenarannya saat gadis yang ia sukai juga tewas secara misterius.

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang wanita berusia akhir dua puluhan yang menemukan kembali bakatnya dalam bertinju setelah lama absen. Secara tak terduga, ia bertemu dengan mantan pelatih tinjunya dan keduanya bekerja sama untuk membantunya mencapai babak final pertandingan tinju profesional.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang tahun-tahun awal Republik Tiongkok, keluarga Kang yang kaya dibunuh secara brutal, dan putri kecil mereka satu-satunya saksi menghilang secara misterius.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: Sebuah kartel narkoba menduduki wilayah Dong Zhou. Mei Jing dari Unit Komando Wanita Thunderbolt memimpin timnya untuk menyerang markas mereka. Namun, Mei dan timnya disergap dan identitas ayah Mei terungkap.

programme.title: Girl With The Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: Lily, adalah seorang gadis biasa yang menjalani kehidupan sederhana. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah pasar antik, dia menemukan sepasang sepatu kaca berlian yang indah. Tanpa disangka, sepatu ini ternyata memiliki kekuatan magis yang dapat mewujudkan impian dan memberikan keberuntungan. Ketika Lily mencoba sepatu tersebut, dia segera menemukan bahwa hidupnya mulai berubah drastis. Dia mendapatkan pekerjaan impiannya, bertemu dengan orang-orang penting, dan bahkan menarik perhatian seorang pangeran modern yang tampan.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng adalah seorang petarung jalanan yang memutuskan untuk hidup di Kowloon Walled City. Ia terlibat dalam perkelahian dan konspirasi. Saat temannya diburu oleh geng triad, Neng harus menyelamatkan temannya.

programme.title: Prince Charming
programme.desc: Chen Li Pin, putra dari pengusaha yang culun, mendapat kekecewaan usai mencari jodoh di Hawaii bersama temannya. Kemudian, secara tak sengaja mereka terjebak dalam sebuah pertukaran identitas yang kacau.

programme.title: Maybe It's Love
programme.desc: Marbles, seorang anak berusia 10 tahun, menyaksikan pembunuhan seorang wanita muda.

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Bintang laga Chow Yun-Fat memerankan gangster sungguhan Chen Daqi saat ia naik ke eselon atas kekuasaan, mendapati dirinya terpecah antara cinta dua wanita, rencana pembunuhan dinas rahasia, dan ancaman perang yang membayangi.

programme.title: Sex Beyond The Grave
programme.desc: Seorang wanita diperkosa dan dibunuh selama Perang Dunia II. Empat puluh tahun kemudian, ia kembali untuk menghantui para penganiayanya dari Rumah Besar Tao Tao. Seorang profesor dan keluarganya pindah ke rumah itu, hanya untuk kemudian roh-roh tersebut mengambil putra mereka.

programme.title: How To Choose A Royal Bride
programme.desc: Kaisar muda Kangxi sedang berusaha memilih seorang istri. Ibunya telah mengatur agar beberapa wanita muda yang tersedia mengunjunginya sehingga ia dapat memilih.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Saat seorang pria meninggalkan istri dan putrinya, serangkaian percakapan singkat, gerakan yang diamati, pertemuan tak sengaja, dan tindakan impulsif, menceritakan kisah hubungan yang gagal dan berkembang setelah keputusan ini.

programme.title: Perfect Girls
programme.desc: Chi akan mewarisi kekayaan kakeknya yang tengah sekarat dengan satu syarat, yaitu ia harus menikah dalam waktu sebulan. Jika tidak, warisan tersebut akan diberikan kepada sang paman yang bernama Robert.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: Seorang Pendeta Taois tidak senang ketika rekan Pendeta Buddha-nya pindah ke sebelah rumahnya. Mereka sering terlibat perselisihan dan duel, tetapi segera harus mengatasi masalah mereka ketika seorang vampir keluar dari peti matinya dan mendatangkan malapetaka di pedesaan.

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: Seorang polisi mengandalkan seorang pencuri mobil muda untuk menangkap empat gangster yang berencana merampok seorang pedagang kaya untuk mendapatkan sejumlah besar uang.

programme.title: Law Or Justice
programme.desc: Seorang model (Joey Wong) diperkosa oleh seorang fotografer (Wilson Lam). Sementara itu, ia berselisih dengan sahabatnya (Carol Cheng) karena pacarnya (Alex Man), seorang polisi.

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agen Wen ditugaskan untuk menyamar sebagai pedagang senjata militer di Asia Tenggara guna menemukan beberapa amunisi dan menghancurkannya. Namun, ia diserang oleh gangster tak dikenal saat menemukan amunisi tersebut.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Ma Wing Jing dan kakaknya, Ma Tai Chueng, tiba di Shanghai untuk mencari peruntungan. Berteman dengan seorang gangster berkuasa, ia diberi klub malam sebagai imbalan atas penyelamatan nyawa Tam Sei. Sayangnya, seorang gangster lain juga menginginkan wilayah tersebut.

programme.title: Behind The Yellow Line
programme.desc: Seorang pria muda yang pemalu dan pekerja kantoran, bertemu dengan seorang wanita cantik dan ambisius yang sedang mengejar karirnya, serta seorang pria lain yang ramah namun penuh rahasia. Pertemuan ini membawa mereka ke dalam perjalanan emosional yang kompleks, penuh dengan kebingungan, kesalahpahaman, dan penemuan diri.

programme.title: The Case Of Disappearances
programme.desc: Ketika Qing Cheng masih remaja, ia diserang oleh monster mutan yang tidak dikenal dan kehilangan keluarga serta ingatannya. Ia dianggap oleh penduduk desa sebagai orang yang tidak menyenangkan yang akan membawa bencana.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembalap ingin membuktikan kelihaiannya dalam sebuah balapan, tapi ia malah melukai rekan setimnya, Lily. Dapatkah tim mereka kembali berjaya kala seorang juara balap mobil virtual bergabung di tim?

programme.title: The Magnificent Scoundrels
programme.desc: Valentino adalah penipu ulung yang bertemu dengan Kwan, sesama penipu. Bersama-sama, mereka menyamar sebagai berbagai orang dan menciptakan berbagai skema untuk menghasilkan uang. Sementara itu, para gangster sedang menyusun skema mereka sendiri.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: Dunia berada dalam kekacauan setelah pohon kehidupan dibakar. Sun Wu Kong pun memutuskan untuk kembali ke masa lalu guna menghidupkannya kembali, tetapi kekuatannya tak stabil usai dirinya kehilangan ikat kepala emas.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Long Wei mengalami gangguan pascatrauma usai kematian istrinya. Suatu hari, ia bertemu Amy yang bekerja di perusahaan teknologi VR dan diundang untuk menguji produk baru. Ia pun menjadi petarung VR perusahaan itu.

programme.title: Gangster, The Cop, The Devil
programme.desc: Detektif Lin membentuk unit khusus untuk menangkap perampok motor dan sindikat di balik aksi pencurian di Foshan usai istrinya yang hamil ditabrak oleh perampok motor.

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: Kepala keluarga kaya meninggal dunia dan dalam wasiatnya mewariskan kekayaannya kepada putrinya. Putranya marah dan menggunakan seorang pengumpul sampah yang mirip dengan saudara perempuannya untuk mencuri kekayaan tersebut. Putra paman juga menginginkan bagian dari kekayaan itu dan memaksa seorang pencuri kecil untuk mencuri wasiat tersebut demi rencana jahatnya.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Dokumenter ini menyoroti para master Kung Fu Tiongkok yang terkenal di industri film, memamerkan warisan Kung Fu Hong Kong selama enam puluh tahun dan mengabadikan kehidupan mereka yang penuh tantangan.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Seorang pengawal kekaisaran dan tiga teman masa kecilnya yang pengkhianat, yang diperintahkan untuk memburunya, secara tidak sengaja terkubur dan membeku dalam waktu. 400 tahun kemudian berlalu dan mereka dicairkan, melanjutkan pertempuran yang mereka tinggalkan.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: Seorang prajurit muda Tiongkok mencuri pedang dari seorang pendekar pedang terkenal dan kemudian melarikan diri ke dunia petualangan romantis bersama seorang pria misterius di perbatasan negara.

programme.title: She Is In Danger
programme.desc: Xue menemukan bahwa Yi dan temannya telah membunuh mantan kekasih Yi, dan ia dikurung oleh keduanya untuk menutupi pembunuhan tersebut. Lalu, teman Xue, Wen, datang mencarinya. Bisakah mereka lolos dari bahaya?

programme.title: Legend Of The Dragon
programme.desc: Stephen Chow berangkat ke kota besar untuk mencoba menyelamatkan rumahnya dengan memenangkan turnamen snooker besar.

programme.title: The Illegal Immigrant

programme.title: Oily Maniac
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda frustrasi yang menderita polio bekerja sebagai asisten hukum untuk seorang pengacara korup. Ia menerima teknik untuk mendapatkan kekuatan aneh dari seorang pria yang sekarat, yang mengubahnya menjadi pahlawan super/penjahat berbasis minyak.

programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.desc: Lima warga New York berkumpul pada malam Natal, mencari sebuah keajaiban.

programme.desc: Seorang juara penunggang banteng berjuang melawan kecanduan.

programme.title: Then Came You
programme.desc: Seorang penderita hipokondria yang bekerja sebagai petugas penanganan bagasi bandara terpaksa menghadapi ketakutannya ketika seorang remaja Inggris yang menderita penyakit mematikan memintanya untuk membantunya mewujudkan daftar keinginan anehnya.

programme.title: The Young And Prodigious...
programme.desc: Seorang ilmuwan berusia 10 tahun diam-diam meninggalkan peternakan keluarganya di Montana tempat ia tinggal bersama ayah koboi dan ibunya ilmuwan, dan melakukan perjalanan melintasi negara dengan menaiki kereta barang untuk menerima penghargaan di Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: The Confirmation
programme.desc: Seorang ayah yang bercerai menghabiskan akhir pekan bersama putranya yang berusia delapan tahun. Namun, ketika kotak peralatan berharga mereka dicuri, pencarian pencuri segera berubah menjadi ikatan keluarga sejati.

programme.title: Faith Of Angels
programme.desc: Seorang asing menerima panggilan misterius yang memaksanya untuk mencari seorang anak laki-laki yang hilang di sebuah tambang terbengkalai.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: Lost Heart
programme.desc: Hannah, seorang mantan bintang musik besar yang kariernya telah meredup, kembali ke kota kecilnya di Michigan Utara, Lost Heart, untuk menghadiri pemakaman ayahnya yang telah lama terpisah darinya. Di sana ia akan menghadapi hantu-hantu masa lalunya dan mungkin menemukan kedamaian dan keseimbangan hidupnya sekali lagi.

programme.title: Come Dance At My Wedding
programme.desc: Tanner Gray terkejut mengetahui setelah kematian mantan istrinya, Andrea, bahwa ia memiliki seorang putri berusia 25 tahun, Cyd. Ia dan istrinya bertemu di sebuah kapal pesiar lebih dari 25 tahun yang lalu, di mana keduanya bekerja sebagai instruktur tari. Mereka jatuh cinta dan menikah, tetapi sementara Andrea ingin menetap di kota kecil asalnya dan mengambil alih studio tari orang tuanya, Tanner berasal dari kota kecil dan ingin bepergian sebelum menetap.

programme.title: Black Lotus
programme.desc: Seorang mantan anggota pasukan khusus melancarkan aksi penyelamatan sendirian di jalan-jalan Amsterdam untuk menyelamatkan putri temannya dari sindikat kejahatan setempat.

programme.title: Deadly Vendetta
programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; namun, segera terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya

programme.title: Savage Dog
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah yang berlatar di Indochina pada tahun 1959, sebuah wilayah di luar jangkauan kekuasaan, masa yang tak kenal belas kasihan, dan kelahiran sebuah legenda.

programme.title: Scorched Earth
programme.desc: Seorang pemburu hadiah bernama Attica Gage melacak penjahat di Bumi pasca-apokaliptik.

programme.title: Death Squad
programme.desc: Ketika semua jalur komunikasi terputus dengan sebuah fasilitas penelitian ilmiah rahasia yang berlokasi di bekas laboratorium biokimia Uni Soviet, sebuah perusahaan militer swasta dibentuk untuk memasuki fasilitas tersebut guna mencari dan mengevakuasi dokter kepala.

programme.title: Heroes And Cowards
programme.desc: Lea Anderson adalah seorang prajurit di Pasukan Khusus Inggris, namun kini ia mulai meragukan pilihan kariernya. Kerahasiaan, pertumpahan darah, dan ketidakmampuan untuk menjalani kehidupan normal menjadi beban yang terlalu berat bagi wanita muda itu, sehingga ia akhirnya memutuskan untuk mengundurkan diri—namun tidak sebelum menjalankan satu misi terakhir di Timur Tengah untuk memastikan timnya dan saudara tirinya, Paul, dapat melewatinya dengan selamat.

programme.desc: Setelah menaklukkan R'yleh dan Kerajaan Beku, Howard Lovecraft muda kini harus melakukan perjalanan ke Kerajaan Bawah Laut untuk membebaskan keluarganya yang ditawan, melindungi tiga buku sihir misterius, dan mencegah murka Cthulhu yang akan datang.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Cindy Crawford
programme.desc: Kehidupan sehari-hari supermodel Cindy Crawford meliputi berolahraga, makan siang bersama Helena Christensen, dan menyalakan lampu di Empire State Building.

programme.title: Black Flowers
programme.desc: Kisah inspiratif dari lima orang penyintas Holocaust yang memilih seni sebagai sarana untuk menyembuhkan luka masa lalu mereka.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: Max Steel
programme.desc: Max McGrath dan rekan aliennya, Steel, harus menggunakan dan menggabungkan kekuatan baru mereka nan luar biasa untuk berubah menjadi pahlawan super Max Steel.

programme.title: Alien Rubicon
programme.desc: Sejumlah bola asing mendarat di planet Bumi dan dengan mudah menghancurkan segala sesuatu yang dilewatinya. Kini, seorang ilmuwan dan Presiden Amerika Serikat harus mencari cara untuk menghentikan invasi alien tersebut.

programme.title: A Crooked Somebody
programme.desc: Seorang cenayang yang mencari perhatian diculik dan mencoba menggunakan situasi ini untuk mendongkrak popularitasnya.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B
programme.desc: Bintang hip-hop ternama Cardi B mengajak Vogue mengunjungi apartemen neneknya di New York City dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Sambil menidurkan putrinya, Kulture, Cardi B berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan Offset, ketertarikannya pada politik, album terbarunya, serta kondisi terkini hak-hak perempuan.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Webs...
programme.desc: Bintang film *Den of Thieves*, 50 Cent, menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang paling banyak dicari di internet tentang dirinya. Apakah 50 Cent pernah kuliah? Apakah 50 Cent seorang miliarder? Apakah 50 Cent orang Jamaika?? 50 Cent menjawab semua pertanyaan ini dan masih banyak lagi!

programme.title: Masterminds
programme.desc: Film yang diangkat dari kasus perampokan Loomis Fargo pada Oktober 1997 tentang seorang pegawai perusahaan mobil lapis baja di Selatan AS yang mengorganisir salah satu perampokan bank terbesar dalam sejarah Amerika.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. programme.title: Lean On Pete
programme.desc: Seorang remaja mendapat pekerjaan musim panas sebagai pelatih kuda dan berteman dengan kuda pacuan yang mulai memudar.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Robert Pattinson
programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.desc: Seri “73 Pertanyaan” dari Vogue kembali hadir, menampilkan Donatella Versace di apartemen mewahnya di Milan.
