programme.title: Beyond The Law
programme.desc: Seorang mafia mencoba untuk langsung dan seorang detektif polisi yang gigih harus bersaing dengan mantan polisi kotor yang ingin membawa pembunuh putranya ke pengadilan.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: Love On The Reef
programme.desc: Seorang ahli biologi kelautan yang cerdas dan serius serta seorang instruktur selam yang ceria dan santai harus bekerja sama untuk menyelamatkan terumbu karang kesayangan mereka dari kehancuran sebelum terlambat.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.
Ethan, seorang buruh, dipanggil untuk menemukan obat atas penyakit yang melanda Bumi. Namun ketika dia melakukan perjalanan 407 tahun ke depan, ketakutan terburuknya menjadi nyata.

programme.title: Kesurupan Jumat Kliwon
programme.desc: Keempat pemuda yang memutuskan untuk bunuh diri karena berbagai masalah. Sebelum bunuh diri, mereka berlibur di rumah tua dekat pantai, yang dimana rumah itu terkenal angker. Terror kepada mereka pun terus berlanjut

programme.title: Subterfuge
programme.desc: Agar diperbolehkan oleh sang ayah untuk bisa tetap dekat dengan kedua anak gadisnya yang menjadi pujaan Doyok dan Kadir, kedua lelaki tersebut menunjukkan usahanya. Namun dengan cara yang asal-asalan.

programme.title: Sunan Kalijaga & Syech Siti Jenar

programme.title: Sister's Verses
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang Adinda yang tinggal bersama keluarga yang memiliki pandangan hidup sediri dan lari dari ajaran agama sesunguhnya.Suatu ketika Adinda membrontak dengan ingin mengikuti lomba MTQ disekolahannya.

programme.title: Selamanya

programme.title: Dunia Mereka
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan tentang sebuah band yang terdiri dari beberapa orang yang mempertemukan mereka karena selera musik yang sama. Namun dalam perjalanan mereka, berbagai masalah pun berdatangan.

programme.title: Jamila Dan Sang Presiden
programme.desc: Seorang perempuan bernama Jamila tiba-tiba menjadi headline di semua pemberitaan nasional. Ia mengaku membunuh seorang pejabat tinggi dan menolak mengajukan grasi kepada Presiden.

programme.title: Mertua Vs Menantu
programme.desc: Bianca menikah dengan Risyad, namun kebahagiaan mereka terganggu oleh hubungan yang tidak harmonis antara Bianca dan mertuanya, Ibu Hany, karena perbedaan yang kerap menimbulkan konflik.

programme.title: Queue Dong
programme.desc: Dendy, pemuda mata keranjang yang berhubungan dengan tiga wanita, Linda, Cindy dan Sally. Masalah datang saat mereka bertiga datang di hari ulang tahunnya.

programme.title: Taxibike
programme.desc: Denny harus menjadi tukang ojek karena di PHK. Dan juga tuntutan dari sang istri. Banyak ibu-ibu yang menjadi langganannya dan menimbulkan kecemburuan dari sang istri. Dan ikut menjadi pengojek dan menyaingi para tukang ojek pria

programme.title: Hotline 666

programme.title: Tonight
programme.desc: Are you in danger of developing a dependence on easily available over-the-counter medicines like codeine, nasal decongestants or sleeping aids? GPs and pharmacists are raising concerns that drugs including codeine, oxymetazoline and antihistamines present significant dangers of becoming habit-forming, even addictive if not used correctly. Sam Holder examines a hidden dependence that can devastate lives and cause long term health problems. He meets those struggling to come off drugs that can be bought in any high street pharmacy without a prescription, and we hear from specialists who warn of what can happen in extreme cases of overuse.

programme.title: The Vardys
programme.desc: Despite Jamie's best efforts on the pitch, his new Italian side are struggling to get a win and stay out of the relegation zone. Things go from bad to worse when the Vardys' lakeside villa is dramatically burgled, leaving the whole family on edge and considering whether to return home. Becky and the kids escape to the mountains for a much-needed change of scenery and time to think clearly about their situation. On a whistle-stop trip back to the UK, Becky and Jamie stage an elaborate photoshoot but also find a quiet moment to make the big decision: whatever happens with the football, they will bring the kids home. On Easter Sunday in Italy, Becky and Jamie reveal their decision to the kids during an Easter Egg hunt to an overwhelming reaction. Shortly after, Becky and Jamie fly the kids back to the UK, arriving home for an emotional reunion with family and friends. But when the season is over, will Jamie be joining them for good or stay in Italy - or will a whole new adventure begin?

programme.title: The Vardys
programme.desc: After an emotional farewell to their home and family in the UK, Becky and the kids make the big move to Italy, taking everything with them - including their dogs and grand piano. But Italian life is immediately complicated, with a frustrated Jamie injured and unable to play but desperate to start scoring goals for his new club. The kids love their new Italian home but struggle being away from friends - will Becky and Jamie's grand plans for Sofia's birthday be enough to take her mind off friends back home? With Jamie's punishing training schedule taking its toll, he doesn't get as much time with the family as he'd like, leaving Becky to help them settle in and do her best to source home comforts for the kids - but she can't find baked beans or orange squash anywhere. Still, Jamie makes time for some magic family moments, and the family begin to find their feet, learning the language, experiencing the culture and Jamie makes his much-awaited debut on the pitch with explosive results.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Arriving in Derry at the end of the Causeway Coastal Route, Dermot finds a city rewriting its story, with the River Foyle as its beating heart. At the Walled City Brewery - once Army Barracks during the Troubles - he uncovers a secret local ingredient behind their standout brews. For a fresh perspective, Dermot hits the water with kayak instructor Michelle, paddling the Foyle and taking in the skyline from a whole new angle - equal parts scenic and splashy. Back on land, things get fiery on a double-decker bus-turned-taco joint. At Pyke 'N' Pommes, local legend Kevin Pyke blends bold Mexican flavours with top-notch Irish seafood. Dermot gets hands-on, prepping calamari and building tasty tacos that capture Derry's evolving food scene.

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Joining Alan Titchmarsh at Manor Farm are Stephen Tompkinson and West End and Broadway star Kerry Ellis. We go behind the scenes at the Globe Theatre ahead of their summer season, and Queen of Herbs Jekka McVicar says 'I do' with herbs with a romantic tale in time for wedding season. Plus, wine expert Toni Osoba has the very best in summer sparkles, and we hear from one woman who gave up her job as a nurse to become a farmer - and she joins us with three of her impressive Highland cows.

programme.title: Ainsley's Fantastic Flavours
programme.desc: Ainsley gets cosy in the kitchen with some recipes to warm the cockles of your heart. Knocking up dishes that feel like a hug, Ainsley makes a sumptuous beef stroganoff puff pastry pie and classic bread and butter pudding with a twist. On his Mediterranean adventures, Ainsley takes a stroll through the historic city of Valletta, and Charlotte Dawson pops in for a taste of Ainsley's warming penne con pollo.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Dermot travels to Letterkenny in Donegal, often called Ireland's 'forgotten county', but quickly discovers a place full of unforgettable people, stories and food. Surrounded by ancient rainforest, he heads into the woods to forage for prized golden chanterelle mushrooms before visiting the renowned Lemon Tree Restaurant, where he learns to make tortellini completely from scratch with one of Donegal's most skilled chefs. Dermot also meets Abdul, a Syrian refugee-turned-honey farmer, who teaches him how to extract honey from the hive and shares traditions from home, including how Syrians enjoy honey with strong coffee and a sweet dish called knaffe. Along the way, Dermot uncovers a county quietly building one of Ireland's most exciting food scenes, shaped by resilience, creativity and a deep connection to the land.

programme.title: Totally Bonkers Guinness World Records
programme.desc: Matt Edmondson writes and narrates this series about the most entertaining Guinness World Records and the brilliant characters who set them as captured by TV shows around the globe - the programme takes viewers on a tour of record-breaking sequences, celebrating the people who have striven to find fame by using their own individual talents to set one of the renowned Guinness World Records. It showcases some of the most incredible and peculiar record-breaking attempts and includes interviews with some of the biggest characters from the world of record-breaking - from the fastest dog on two wheels to the longest fingernails in the US, this fun-packed series reveals some of the most extraordinary humans and amazing animals to be found on Planet Earth and is also jammed with the key facts and statistics for each record attempt and the people involved. In this episode, Matt highlights Japanese skipping dogs, the quickest 100-metre moonwalk, and the dog with the longest tongue in the world.

Inspired by Eleanor's happy home life, Janet determines to persevere with the dating game, but a speed dating evening proves a disaster when she realises that she is unable to step out of character and has been interviewing every man there as if he was a suspect. The latest case involves the murder of a woman in a Manchester hotel; with only a necklace and the name Lola to go on, Syndicate Nine try to piece together her last known movements. programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa is grumpy and can't sleep because Martin can't sleep - Mrs Tishell and Jennifer continue their battle of wills in the chemist when Louisa comes in and asks for something to help with sleep. Jennifer suggests lavender oil which Mrs Tishell dismisses as a herbal remedy, but this doesn't put Louisa off and she douses Martin's pillow with the oil - however, Martin can smell it a mile off and Louisa has to come clean. Elsewhere, Martin treats the local hypochondriac and becomes concerned that he may have been exposed to asbestos while doing roof conversions in the village, and Jennifer is worried when she and Mrs Tishell get a letter from the Pharmaceutical Council saying that Mrs Tishell no longer needs supervision - Bert is miserable about Jennifer leaving as Al tells him that he should do something to get her to stay, and that is exactly what he does...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa tries to get Martin to open up about the loss of his father, but Martin says that it doesn't affect him - when Louisa suggests a break so they can all get away and spend some time together, Martin doesn't want to and Louisa is hurt by this. At the same time, things are strained between Martin and his mother - she is trying to connect with him, but he is cutting her off. Elsewhere, Mrs Tishell is smitten by the hand-holding and the staring into her eyes of the Doc during a routine examination and falls head over heels in love with him again, there is a visit at the police station by two military policemen looking for Mike Pruddy, and the wind is taken out of Al's sails when he tells his dad about a business idea he has - to be a middleman between tourists wanting fishing trips and the fishermen - and Bert laughs at the idea as he thinks there is no way that the fishermen will give him a ten per cent cut of their take.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series exploring the personal and professional lives of two female detectives in Manchester. Janet is unnerved to discover that DSI Dodson cannot ignore her concerns about Gill's drinking, and just as Rachel feels as if she is getting to grips with the job, she makes a fatal error that puts Janet and Chris in danger. Meanwhile, when a man's body is found wedged between rocks on the moors with nothing to identify him, a roadblock is set up and an appeal put out. Enquiries lead Janet and Chris to a nearby farm, but they discover something much more sinister and shocking than they could ever have anticipated.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Classic sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan and Jack eavesdrop on a medical check-up that Blakey is having, but they end up jumping to the wrong conclusions.

programme.title: Inspector Morse

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Miss Marple investigates when her holiday at an old school friend's coastal villa is interrupted by the mysterious death of one of her fellow guests just hours after he told the ghostly tale of a murderous child.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby gets to relive his former days of sporting glory when a death at a local rugby club sends him and Winter into a muddle of rucks, old grudges, new romances and artisanal chocolates.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Unimpressed at being dragged to a wedding by Sarah, things go from bad to worse for Barnaby when the local bride is murdered. Barnaby must unveil the murderer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Ferabbees Circus is back in town and things start to take a gruesome turn. A chain of sinister clown sightings, threatening notes and deathly dangerous circuits acts ensue, meaning Barnaby has to face up to his fears so that he is able to solve the case.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer is buzzing with excitement at the arrival of the annual Paramount Dance Extravaganza, but behind the sequins and smiles are deep-running feuds and passions and the desire to win can outweigh just about anything when the stakes are high.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Drama based on the novel by Ann Cleeves. After news breaks that Jeanine Long has taken her own life, evidence comes to light exonerating her for the murder of 15-year-old Abigail Mantel 11 years earlier. Jeanie had always insisted on her innocence but no-one - including her own family - believed her. Vera sets out to solve the mystery of Abigail's death, and she and her team delve into the secrets and lies of a small community which is still feeling the repercussions of the killing. Vera digs away at the evidence in her efforts to get closer to the truth, but not before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn when another, potentially connected, murder occurs. With a killer on the loose and the pressure building, Vera must use her skill and instinct to expose the lies at the community's heart - and to lay the ghosts of Abigail and Jeanie to rest.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Another investigation for Colin Dexter's laconic detective. Morse is drawn into the case of a schoolgirl who has been missing for six months when her wealthy father refuses to leave any stone unturned - the subsequent investigations uncover some unsavoury home truths about the private lives of the girl's family and the staff at her school.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Action-packed police series. When a wealthy couple are robbed of their possessions while driving down a country lane, Carter gets to meet up with an old friend but not in the circumstances he would have wished.

programme.title: Fewer
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. When Arthur allows himself to be persuaded into retirement, Ray is quick to take control of Daley Enterprises - however, Arthur finds that a life of leisure isn't to his taste and Ray soon finds his hands full without that Arthurian magic.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is shocked to learn that his supposedly dead Vietnamese wife is not only alive and well, but also in Hawaii.

programme.title: Boon

programme.title: No Room For Error
programme.desc: The Isle of Man is in the throes of a fortnight like no other - the three-wheelers are moving heaven and earth to achieve their dreams and flinging themselves from apex to apex to break lap records. From brothers in arms honing machinery to thrills and spills, there's pelvic pain and medical hurdles to overcome - however, the sidecar roster is a hardy breed of men and women who stare fear in the eye and let fear blink first.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. The police hire the Protectors to guard the corpse of a bank robber as part of a plan to capture his accomplices.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. New crowd favourite Ripperoni offers a slice of its deadly pizza weapon to HiJinx, and Malice is determined to carve a victory against Valkyrie - meanwhile, the world's best flipper Hydra tries to finally hit the roof with Free Shipping. Elsewhere, it's a family affair when Blip meets its stablemate Tantrum - both bots are now desperate for a win after a poor start, and the gloves are off even though they have the same designer.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas learns that his former wife Michelle, now married to the head of a Vietnamese delegation, has been targeted for assassination by a secret police chief who suspects that she may be leader of a revolt against his country.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is surprised when a beautiful woman from England spurns his advances - much to the amusement of TC and Rick - and prefers Higgins. Thomas is certain that the woman is feigning interest in Higgins to somehow use him for an ulterior motive and plans to uncover the truth, but Higgins sees his doubts as jealousy and the relationship between the two men is pushed towards breaking point.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: The concluding part of a two-part episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Harry continues his pursuit of the character who ran off with all the money from the charity ball he held, and Margaret takes on a blackmail case.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Police series. When a gang hijack an armoured security truck and steal the money inside it, Regan, Carter and the Flying Squad set up an ambush to catch the crooks and an informer.

programme.title: Fewer
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. The Winchester Club is faced with permanent closure when one of Arthur's money-making schemes backfires badly, but Ray is on hand with an idea - how about a charity football match between the Winchester XI and the local police?

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Danielle finds a collector with a 1937 Harley Knucklehead motorbike while the guys quickly pick through a farm.

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners Allen Millyard and Guy Willison have now got their Weslake bike after trawling Britain's sheds and auction houses for rusty relics on which to make a tidy profit, but they need to test it out and make enough money at a final jumble in Ardingly to pay to take it racing.

programme.title: Berlin Station

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. It's a race to the finale as the chefs are faced with a Grand Prix challenge with a twist - during dinner service, the chefs are then put to the test to see if they have the attention to detail it takes to run a kitchen with a few tricks thrown in by Gordon. Tasked with impressing guest diners including the New York Jets' Solomon Thomas, Superstore actor Lauren Ash, talk show host Sean Evan and former Journey lead singer Jeff Scott Soto, we find out which chefs take a victory lap and which ones will fall flat.

programme.desc: From 2014. Dr. Will Caster is the leading researcher in artificial intelligence, but his controversial experiments have earned him many enemies.
From 2019. The two young British soldiers, Scofield and Blake, are thrown into a seemingly impossible mission. In a race against time, they must cross enemy territory to prevent a devastating attack.

programme.title: Heretic
programme.desc: From 2024. The two young missionaries Sister Barnes and Sister Paxton knock on the door of the eccentric Mr. Reed. He warmly welcomes them in, but it soon dawns on them that this blueberry pie-scented home is not quite what it first appears…

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: From 2024. The brutal origin story of Marvel's iconic villain Kraven, a man with a complex relationship with his ruthless father, who becomes the world's greatest hunter.

programme.title: Hood
programme.desc: From 2025. A determined CEO who is on the brink of an exit contract of NOK 250 million must gather his co-founders. But a betrayed partner strikes back, forcing a power struggle.

programme.title: The Sisterhood of the Traveling Pants
programme.desc: From 2005. The film is about a magical summer in the lives of four childhood friends who experience having to be apart for the first time. In a thrift store, the girls find some ola trousers that fit like a glove on all fours.

programme.title: The Best of Me
programme.desc: From 2014. Childhood sweethearts Amanda and Dawson reunite after twenty years, when they return to their hometown to attend the funeral of an old friend.

programme.title: Delivery Man

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: From 2022. Otto, a grumpy, irritable and very strict widower, lives a lonely life and judges everyone he sees. As he forms an unlikely friendship with his new neighbors, Otto begins to change.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino's 8th film takes place in wintry Wyoming, where eight strangers, including two bounty hunters and a wanted fugitive, find themselves battling the elements and each other.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 1
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 2
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen secara sukarela menggantikan adik perempuannya dalam Hunger Games: sebuah kompetisi televisi di mana dua remaja dari masing-masing dua belas Distrik Panem dipilih secara acak untuk bertarung sampai mati.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2
programme.desc: Alur cerita semakin rumit ketika para pahlawan, Pak dan Hak, menemukan rencana mengerikan dari seorang jenius jahat bernama "DR. Magma" yang menghidupkan kembali orang mati yang jahat dan memaksa mereka melawan para biksu Shaolin yang telah menguasai seni bela diri.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 2
programme.desc: Katniss dan tim pemberontak dari Distrik 13 bersiap untuk pertempuran terakhir yang akan menentukan nasib Panem.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Saat seorang pria meninggalkan istri dan putrinya, serangkaian percakapan singkat, gerakan yang diamati, pertemuan tak sengaja, dan tindakan impulsif, menceritakan kisah hubungan yang gagal dan berkembang setelah keputusan ini.

programme.title: The Spore

Tidak seorang pun dapat mengenali si penyerang kecuali Mae Nak, yang berubah menjadi roh jahat untuk menghukum si penyerang atas perbuatan jahatnya.

programme.desc: Digigit kelelawar gila, seorang penyiar radio larut malam meneror rekan-rekan kerjanya saat dia perlahan-lahan berubah menjadi vampir.

programme.title: Kingmaker
programme.desc: Film ini didasarkan pada kisah anekdotal tentang hubungan kerja antara Kim Dae-jung dan ahli strategi politiknya, Uhm Chang-rok. Seo Chang-dae adalah seorang ahli strategi politik yang mengutamakan kemenangan di atas segalanya, sedangkan Kim Woon-beom adalah seorang politisi dengan ambisi menjadi presiden terkemuka. programme.title: Abroad

programme.title: Karib Karib Single
programme.desc: Jaya dan Yogi yang sudah bercerai dengan pasangan masing-masing pergi liburan bersama usai bertemu melalui sebuah aplikasi kencan. Dapatkan cinta bersemi di antara dua orang yang berbeda kepribadian ini?

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is celebrating a special anniversary. In this issue we look back at 250 episodes that we produced in German for Motorvision. Moderator Martin Utberg shows the most beautiful moments, special encounters and unforgettable vehicles from the past few years - told personally and to the point. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: lassic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: A special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Nobody is faster, nobody is more reliable, nobody is more successful. Whether Le Mans, the Monte Carlo Rally or Formula 1: There is no race or rally that Porsche has not won, 28,000 times in 65 years. World record. Porsche wins a race with the first prototype, unforgettable the successes of the James Dean sypder at the Carrera Panamericana or the Targa Florio. In 1970 the first Le Mans victory with the 'monster', the Porsche 917. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Compact, modern, electric! E-SUVs are conquering our big cities. Volvo is sending the EX30 to attract customers. The brand's new smallest model is supposed to impress with Swedish coolness and plenty of power. The Renault Scenic E-Tech is half a size larger. After many successful years of the combustion engine variant, the French are giving the minivan batteries and an SUV silhouette. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Cars look impressive on the outside - no one hides their sporting ambitions. At the Ford Focus ST 5 tournament, it quickly becomes clear through spoilers, wide tires, painted brake calipers, ST logos, but above all through the centrally placed exhaust pipe and the exciting engine sound that the family is not supposed to travel with this car, but that dad wants to go on the motorway on Sunday - and alone! (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: In the motherland of the V8, the craziest car show in the world is celebrated every year in Las Vegas. At Sema, manufacturers, tuners and customers present their concept cars, visions and hand-finished automotive treasures. Everything that has rank and name in the tuning scene comes together here. Whether hoonigan and professional speedster Ken Block, the German tuning legend JP alias Jean-Pierre Krämer and Porsche punk Magnus Walker. Everyone gets inspiration at SEMA. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: With 3.5 million units sold worldwide, the Mercedes Sprinter is one of the most popular commercial vehicles. In the third generation it is more modern than ever. Thanks to numerous connectivity applications, it is intended to make fleet management easier. It is also equipped with car-level comfort and safety features. We test the Sprinter around Amsterdam. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In 2019, Porsche celebrated 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993 based on an existing original bodyshell - the unique "Project Gold". Also: the Q5 Sportback, Audi's mid-range SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Alfa Romeo's latest creation: The GTA version of the 147. The already pretty design of the 147 has been properly trimmed towards sportiness. Voluminous air inlets and outlets as well as bulbous wheel arches suit it very well. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: A gravel pit becomes a stunt laboratory: the stunt heroes from Action Concept test for their favorite production “Alarm for Cobra 11”. They send a motorcycle freestyle over a ramp and shoot themselves into the water with a specially built human catapult. They are also experimenting with a new system: This is designed to allow a prepared car to roll over several times in the sand at 70 km/h. Stuntwoman Tina takes over the job as driver! (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: One of Europe's leading manufacturers of luxury caravans and premium motorhomes has its headquarters in Jandelsbrunn, Lower Bavaria: the Knaus Tabbert company. It all started in the mid-50s. At that time, Alfred Tabbert built the “Ideal”, the first caravan in series production. The 'Margrave' follows in 1960. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Tonga is a constitutional monarchy. Peter Goldstern was already in the service of George Tupou the 5th's father. He is now one of the king's closest confidants and has received several awards. Only he is allowed and can fly the royal machine. That's why, even at the age of 70, he still takes the controls and drives the boss, including his dog on board, across the island archipelago. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: A great rattling in your ears is what you know about motorcycling. But the future could look or sound different, and quietly. Is this still real motorcycling or does the electric drive completely rob you of the emotion? To find out, we test the latest models from Can-Am, Pulse and Origin, and visit the first European festival for electric motorcycles in Berlin. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world, a synonym for comfort and opulence and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: the Mercedes S-Class. But why is that so? What makes this vehicle so special and sets it apart from all others? We drive all model series, from the 450 SEL 6.9 to the current S 580 e, and explore the fascination of each model. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Chief Constable Aimo Rautianen from the Finnish town of Kuusankoski, which has a population of 22,000, goes on a mug hunt with a very special company car: a '76 Trabant L 601. It's not the only automotive curiosity from Finland. Timo Ukkonen is a talented hobbyist and turned his 1963 Skoda Octavia sedan into an original pickup. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most exciting cars in the world and arouse more desire than any other vehicle, the international coupes from Maserati, Porsche, Bentley, Mercedes and Rolls Royce. With their extraordinary design and powerful engines, coupes arouse more emotions than any other car; they are the epitome of elegance and exclusivity in automobile construction. Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking dream coupes in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg and his team partner Sven Bössow are taking part in the Black Forest Winter Challenge, organized by the Hotel Ritter in Durbach, which is well-known among classic car lovers. For this occasion, Martin and Sven drive a Porsche 924 S from 1987. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It looks like a Ferrari, but comes from the Lower Bavarian province: the Glas GT. Uwe Gusen is one of the few who are still interested in the Glas brand - because it is racing at full speed into oblivion. If you want to buy one, you should hurry up and know your way around. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: Adventure Allrad, a special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: For the joy of driving: That's what BMW, one of the most successful automobile companies in the world, stands for. The decidedly sporty automobiles and motorcycles from Bayrisch Motorenwerke AG are equally successful with customers and in racing. But the former aircraft engine manufacturer's entry into automobile production threatened to fail early on. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: The recipe for a successful car these days usually consists of: SUV shape and electric drive. The Avenger is Jeep's new smallest car in its lineup. The winner of the Car of the Year Award will go on a 250 kilometer road trip through Germany. The Cupra Tavascan is also the brand's first electric SUV. Can he set himself apart from his VW Group brothers? (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Mitsubishi Lancer began its career in the World Rally Championship in 1993 as the Evolution I. Off the road he shows what he can do and with great success. In 1996, Tommi Mäkinen achieved five World Championship race victories with the EVO III and won the title. But the success story doesn't end there. The Subaru WRX Sti is also extremely successful in rallying. What's interesting is that the two Japanese are so similar that they have been compared for model generations. Motorvision introduces the two opponents! (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: The ASBK is an Australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season (channel info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: McLaren – from Formula 1 to Can Am
programme.desc: McLaren is the second oldest active team in Formula 1 and now enjoys worldwide fame. However, when it was founded, hardly anyone would have expected that the team founded by New Zealand racing driver Bruce McLaren would develop into a heavyweight in the world of super sports cars and one of the best-known teams in motorsport. Racing Files tells the story of McLaren. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the fastest art collection in the world: Designed by Andy Warhol, Roy Liechtenstein, Frank Stella and Jeff Koons, the world's most famous artists, BMW has been launching the racing art objects at Le Mans for many years. Whether it's the BMW M1, the Le Mans prototype or the M3 GT2, the BMW Art Cars are the most extraordinary cars in the history of Le Mans. At the helm of the world's fastest works of art are the world's fastest pilots, Hans-Joachim Stuck, Manfred Winkelhock and Andy Priaulx. Car History shows the history of the BMW Art Cars at Le Mans, with many original sounds from Jeff Koons, Frank Stella, Hans Stuck and Andy Priaulx. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Half a century of Ferrari. Rearview Mirror gets to the bottom of the Ferrari myth and takes a close look at the red racers from Maranello. (Station info).

programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: England Special. England is the craziest car country in the world: the steering wheel is on the right, driving is on the left, UK cars offer everything but average. Whether Aston Martin, Jaguar, Bentley or Morgan and McLaren, MV Spotted shows the most spectacular UK convertibles, coupes and supercars. MV Spotted also shows the tics of the British, bizarre competitions such as lawnmower racing and the cult of James Bond. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Porsche is exiting the diesel business. Hybrids like the Cayenne E-Hybrid should become more important. We tested its 3.2 liter average consumption. We also explore the region around Spartenburg in the BMW X4 – the birthplace of the coupé SAV. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: On the occasion of Skoda's 125th anniversary, we look back at the eventful history of one of the oldest automobile manufacturers in the world. Also: our practical test of the Volkswagen ID.3, the first purely electric car from VW. And: the McLaren 720S Spider, the super sports car is now also available as a convertible. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Evil eye, explosive power – outlaw image: street fighter. 20 years ago they were still rare lone warriors and are now part of everyday street life. But where does this trend actually come from – and how has it developed further? We find answers at the Fighterama sports and tuning trade fair - the annual meeting place for customizing and tuning beyond the Harley. The chief fighter is the trade fair organizer Markus Broix - here at the befitting donut burn - he was there from the start. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Stuntman Dominik is an expert in falls and body stunts. But today he has to drive the stunt car. The task: drive straight through a truck and do a complete rollover. Firstly: The number is not for the faint of heart. Second: The number is dangerous! (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: A TV portrait! Abt Sportsline is the world's largest refiner of vehicles from the Volkswagen Group and is closely linked to the Audi brand. The company's second pillar: motorsport. Whether DTM, formula or GT racing. The abbots are always at the forefront. A company with a unique success story and constant growth. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Dubai - city of luxury, fast cars and incredible stories. Just like a man's: his passion is cars: fast cars. Nice cars. Special cars. And he has two dream jobs: He is a racing driver and president of the Porsche Club in the United Arab Emirates. Karim Al Azhari loves and lives luxury, but every now and then he is really stressed. For example, when, like now, he has to organize a motorsport event on the Abu Dhabi racing circuit. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Motorcycle riding fun is diverse. Some like retro, others look to the future. We test the Royal Enfield Shotgun 650 in an old-school look and reveal exciting facts about the Indian manufacturer with British roots. Also: Electric motorcycles aren't fun? We check whether this is true and take a closer look at the Can-Am Pulse electric city cruiser. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Which sports car fan doesn't secretly dream of a Porsche 911. It is THE sports car from Germany. Compact, iconic and stable in value. And that despite the fact that with over 1.3 million units it is one of the most produced sports cars of all time. Classic car dealer Michael Schnabl, founder of Motorlegenden, makes car dreams come true. His specialty: rare and incredibly expensive Porsche models. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Magazine for motorcycle fans for whom motorcycling is not just a hobby, but a way of life. Whether Ducati or Kawasaki, Suzuki or the classic Harley Davidson, whether an off-the-shelf motorcycle or a specially made custom bike. There are reports about biker clubs and real enthusiasts, about tours, meetings and events. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: An extremely powerful V8 engine embedded in a delicate roadster body: The AC Cobra is more animal than car with simply adventurous driving characteristics. Rolf Versen has been driving a Cobra for 30 years and is still loyal to his reptile. Also: Classic celebrates the French all-round genius Lucien Rosengartd and his speedsters. And: On the road with friends of old fire engines. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most spectacular convertibles in the world, two-seater racing cars without a roof, built for top speeds of over 300 kilometers per hour, built for unique driving pleasure, the super sports convertibles from Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, Bentley and McLaren. Engines with more than 500 hp, chassis from Formula 1, as well as breathtaking body shapes, SuperSport convertibles are the most fascinating of all automobiles. Dream Cars presents the fastest and most exclusive SuperSport convertibles in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: The Reliant Scimitar is virtually unknown in Germany, but in England it was a car with a kind of cult status just a few decades ago. This is probably why the British royal family used this vehicle as a means of transport for many years. Classic introduces the exotic. Plus: a transport wonder on three wheels. The Moto Guzzi Hercules saves many a small farmer. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Classic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: A special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It's the James Dean Porsche, the 550 Spyder. It is small, flat and fast. And it will only be built 140 times. Nevertheless, the Porsche 550 Spyder makes history. It is the first racing sports car from Porsche, and it laid the foundation for the sports car manufacturer from Stuttgart to be considered a major player in racing today. There is no race that he doesn't win, he has been considered unbeatable for many years. And it is the car in which Hollywood star James Dean had a fatal accident. The accident makes Dean and the 550 Spyder a legend. Car History tells the whole story of the dream car from the 1950s. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electric cars are emotionless and boring? These electric cars want to prove the opposite: The VW ID. Buzz GTX throws all-wheel drive and 340 hp into the ring. But how athletic is he really? And this isn't an electric car at all, at least that's how it's supposed to sound and feel. The Hyundai Ioniq 5 N makes you think you are sitting in a high-performance gasoline engine. We reveal how exactly this works. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Audi A1 quattro vs Renault Clio R.S. – two crazy small cars in the Perfect Ride comparison test! The Audi A1 quattro has a 1.2 liter 4-cylinder turbo engine with 256 hp. Top speed: 245. Renault has with the Clio R.S. turned one of its most traditional models into a powerful little racing machine: 1.6 liter 4-cylinder turbo, 200 hp and a top speed of 225 km/h. Two spirited racers, neither of whom knows exactly where they belong: on the racetrack or in the city. (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: In the third part of the 6th ASBK event at One Raceway we will once again focus on the juniors in the Oceania Junior Cup, the R3 Cup and the Supersport 300 class. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Classic cars and everything that goes with them: events, racing, portraits, mechanic tips and the most beautiful pictures from the automobile archives from all over the world. The most beautiful oldies, the hottest racing cars from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: Another total cancellation of the race day on the Isle of Man due to the weather, but instead we had the opportunity to talk in more detail with the Crowe brothers and Davey Todd and take a look back at the most spectacular races of the week. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: All Wheel Drive Safari Challenge 2025
programme.desc: The "AWDC" is a British off-road event in which drivers have to tackle narrow and winding roads full of mud and gravel (channel info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling 2023
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It's the James Dean Porsche, the 550 Spyder. It is small, flat and fast. And it will only be built 140 times. Nevertheless, the Porsche 550 Spyder makes history. It is the first racing sports car from Porsche, and it laid the foundation for the sports car manufacturer from Stuttgart to be considered a major player in racing today. There is no race that he doesn't win, he has been considered unbeatable for many years. And it is the car in which Hollywood star James Dean had a fatal accident. The accident makes Dean and the 550 Spyder a legend. Car History tells the whole story of the dream car from the 1950s. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electric cars are emotionless and boring? These electric cars want to prove the opposite: The VW ID. Buzz GTX throws all-wheel drive and 340 hp into the ring. But how athletic is he really? And this isn't an electric car at all, at least that's how it's supposed to sound and feel. The Hyundai Ioniq 5 N makes you think you are sitting in a high-performance gasoline engine. We reveal how exactly this works. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Audi A1 quattro vs Renault Clio R.S. – two crazy small cars in the Perfect Ride comparison test! The Audi A1 quattro has a 1.2 liter 4-cylinder turbo engine with 256 hp. Top speed: 245. Renault has with the Clio R.S. turned one of its most traditional models into a powerful little racing machine: 1.6 liter 4-cylinder turbo, 200 hp and a top speed of 225 km/h. Two spirited racers, neither of whom knows exactly where they belong: on the racetrack or in the city. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Gearing Up 2026
programme.desc: Pure passion for racing, extraordinary talent and thrills right up to the last second - that's what this magazine promises, reporting on the most exciting motorsport events. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Compact high-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. From the 2002 turbo to the 1 Series M Coupe to the current M2. We take a closer look at the second generation and test the drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities of the M2. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development and take a look at its competitors. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun. We put them to the test in Portugal. And this is supposed to be a Smart? Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Robust and popular - these are the keywords for these models. Subaru has renamed the XV. Completely renovated and with the new name Cros-strek, the SUV is now looking for customers. We reveal what's behind it. And Cupra is giving its bestseller Formentor an update that is particularly causing a visual sensation. We explain why. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025
Red Bull Romaniacs
programme.desc: The Romaniacs have become a permanent highlight in the hard enduro community's calendar. After some riders were denied the meeting last year, it was now even more beautiful in Sibiu. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: All Wheel Drive Safari Challenge 2025
programme.desc: The "AWDC" is a British off-road event in which drivers have to tackle narrow and winding roads full of mud and gravel (channel info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling 2023
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: With the first Supersport race shortened to 3 laps, the question was whether Hicky could once again demonstrate his dominance from the Superbike race, whether Lee Johnston could repeat his success from last year or whether Michael Dunlup would live up to his role as favorite here. It was a hot fight! (Station info).

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Belgian Rally Championship is one of the most competitive rally championships at national level. This also attracts prominent guest starters such as Thierry Neuville, Craig Breen and Stéphane Lefebvre. (Station info).

programme.title: BTRDA Rallycross 2025
programme.desc: The races of the British Trial and Rally Drivers Association, which was founded in 1938, are highly competitive. The rallycross track with changing surfaces challenges the best drivers in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2026
programme.desc: The Tour European Rally 2023 traditionally starts with the promo event in Finland. The 58th edition of the spectacular Arctic Lapland Rally offers pure action and excitement on the snow and ice slopes of Finland. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, Eric van Lammeren tells the special story behind the recreation of the Bugatti Type 41 Royale prototype, which Ettore Bugatti used as a private vehicle for five years and which was considered lost for a long time after a crash. In the SML CarGroup showroom, Eric speaks to an audience with Thomas Hientz and presenter Martin Utberg about the background and fascination of this extraordinary project. Martin and Thomas are also traveling in a very special Mercedes-AMG PureSpeed. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is celebrating a special anniversary. In this issue we look back at 250 episodes that we produced in German for Motorvision.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The show rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light cars from the last few decades that are sometimes almost forgotten, sometimes noble, sometimes bizarre. No matter where - these extraordinary vehicles are absolute eye-catchers.

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: This magazine deals with various off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. It provides information about off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. The vehicles are presented and their qualities are examined in more detail.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The Porsche brand is more successful than any other. It is considered particularly fast and reliable. It has always been successful in the big races, such as Le Mans, the Monte Carlo Rally or Formula 1.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Compact, modern, electric! E-SUVs are conquering our big cities. Volvo is sending the EX30 to attract customers. The brand's new smallest model is supposed to impress with Swedish coolness and plenty of power.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: At the Ford Focus ST 5 Tournament, it quickly becomes clear through the spoiler, wide tires, painted brake calipers, ST logos and, above all, the centrally positioned exhaust pipe that it is not intended for family vacations.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the corner. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: In the motherland of the V8, the craziest car show in the world is celebrated every year in Las Vegas. At SEMA, manufacturers, tuners and customizers from all over the world present their concept cars, visions and hand-finished automotive treasures.

programme.title: 4x4 - Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: With 3.5 million units sold worldwide, the Mercedes Sprinter is one of the most popular commercial vehicles. In the third generation it is more modern than ever. The magazine tests the model on the streets around Amsterdam.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In 2019, Porsche celebrated 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993, the unique Project Gold, based on an existing original bodyshell.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: Alfa Romeo's latest creation is a GTA version of the 147. The already pretty design of the 147 has been properly trimmed towards sportiness. Voluminous air inlets and outlets as well as bulbous wheel arches suit it very well.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: A gravel pit becomes a stunt laboratory: the stunt heroes from Action Concept test for their favorite production “Alarm for Cobra 11”. They send a motorcycle freestyle over a ramp and shoot themselves into the water with a specially built human catapult. They are also experimenting with a new system: This is designed to allow a prepared car to roll over several times in the sand at 70 km/h. Stuntwoman Tina takes over the job as driver!

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Sometimes people and machines don't make a good mix. Especially when it comes to operating very heavy or fast vehicles. The program shows video recordings that provide evidence.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The Knaus Tabbert company from Jandelsbrunn is a manufacturer of luxury caravans and premium motorhomes. Alfred Tabbert produced the first caravan in series production as early as the 1950s. The next model followed in 1960.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Tonga is a constitutional monarchy. Peter Goldstern was already in the service of George Tupou the 5th's father. He is now one of the king's closest confidants and is the only one allowed to fly the royal plane.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: A great rattling in your ears - that's what you know about motorcycling. But the future could look or sound different, and quietly. Is this still ¿real¿ motorcycling or does the electric drive completely rob you of the emotion?

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world - a synonym for comfort and opulence - and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: the Mercedes S-Class. But why is that so?

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The magazine for motorcycle fans reports on biker clubs, tours, meetings and events.

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Aimo from Kuusankoski goes hunting for criminals with a very special company car: a '76 Trabant L 601. Timo is a talented hobbyist and turned his 1963 Škoda Octavia sedan into an original pickup.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the corner. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.desc: This magazine deals with various off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. It provides information about off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. The vehicles are presented and their qualities are examined in more detail.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: James Dean was killed in the Porsche 550 Spyder. The car is 60 years old. The flat and fast car laid the foundation for the incredible success story of the Stuttgart sports car manufacturer.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Electric cars are emotionless and boring? These electric cars want to prove the opposite: the VW ID. Buzz GTX throws all-wheel drive and 340 hp into the ring. But how athletic is he really? And this one isn't an electric car at all.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: In the comparison test, the Audi A1 quattro and the Renault Clio R.S. opposite. The Audi A1 quattro has a 1.2 liter 4-cylinder turbo engine with 256 hp. The top speed is 245 kilometers per hour.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the corner. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Gearing Up 2026
programme.desc: The show provides insights into what happens at the world's most unique motorsport events.

programme.title: FastZone 2026

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: High-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. We take a close look at the current M2 and test its drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development.

programme.title: 4x4 - Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Subaru has renamed the XV. Renewed and with the new name Crosstrek, the SUV is now looking for customers - we reveal what's behind it. Cupra is giving its bestseller Formentor an update that is particularly causing a stir visually.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, and not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas, making this region a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time.

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks.

programme.desc: Benjamin Ketterl is one of 58 emergency drivers in the Munich area. The Yellow Angel is mostly on the move in the city, but highway patrols are also part of the roster. The program accompanies the ADAC employee in his everyday work.

programme.desc: Brabus is one of the best-known tuning companies in the world. Exclusivity is the order of the day here. If you find the performance of a Mercedes-AMG to be too low, you should take a closer look at this tuner from Bottrop.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sustainability in mobility 1: Optimized combustion engines
programme.desc: Combustion engines have ensured our progress for 125 years. The world population is growing and more and more cars are being sold. In order to continue to preserve the environment, manufacturers are trying to take measures to reduce emissions levels.

programme.title: Dream Cars

programme.desc: The creators of the Apollo 3500 GT wanted to camouflage and deceive. The appearance of the sleek two-seater, which was released in 1962, is pure Italy, from the chrome spoke wheels, the leather-lined interior to the Pininfarina-style body.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. It's also about the Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. Everyone is also testing the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera.

programme.desc: AMG stands for exclusivity, top automotive performance and dynamic driving fun. The company belongs to Daimler AG and is responsible for high-performance vehicles.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: The Grasshopper
programme.desc: Christine Adams leaves her small town in British Columbia at age 19 to follow her boyfriend to L.A., where he works for a bank. She soon gets bored and moves to Las Vegas and becomes a showgirl, eventually slipping into prostitution.

programme.title: Mozambique
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling, kidnap and murder.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. programme.title: The Grasshopper

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: The Worm Eaters
programme.desc: A German hermit, who can talk with worms, seeks revenge on the town's mayor by putting mutant worms in everyone's meals and turning them into human worm slaves.

programme.title: Trinity Is Still My Name
programme.desc: Two brothers try to fulfill the promise they made to their dying father.

programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Atwater, Ohio

programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Turlock, California

programme.desc: S1 E16 — Assistance systems on two-wheelersAssistance systems on two-wheelers usually seem exotic or even unthinkable. BMW is now offering the blind spot warning system for the first time. This is ideal for the dense traffic in big cities, the home territory of the new C 650 GT maxi scooter.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 E231 — Luxury and LifestyleEnglish luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: S12 — Tenerife and La Gomera EXPERIENCE 2023, Part 2The magazine for motorcycle fans reports on biker clubs, tours, meetings and events.

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Episode 21In Germany, the Reliant Scimitar is virtually unknown, but in England it is a car with a kind of cult status. This is probably why the British royal family used this vehicle as a means of transport for many years.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: S2 E31 — Episode 31We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the curve. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: S2 E18 — eCarsWhether Tesla, McLaren P1, Ferrari La Ferrari or Renovo Coupe, the battery- and hybrid-powered cars impress with their fascinating design, but also with their intelligent technology, breathtaking acceleration and unique dynamics.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: S6 E242 — Classics on the way to the auction In this episode of Top Speed, presenter Martin Utberg visits the classic car gallery in Toffen, Switzerland.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S1 E19 — Talbot Lago 2500 Sport Europa CoupeIt's the little man's Ferrari - the Fiat Dino Spider. For many it is the most beautiful Fiat ever built. There's actually a Ferrari engine working under the hood and it's making a lot of steam.

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: S2 E21 — Episode 21This magazine deals with various off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. It provides information about off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. The vehicles are presented and their qualities are examined in more detail.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 — VW Golf - The mega seller The VW Golf is considered a classic, is the most successful car in Europe and is not at all exciting. The program tells the success story of the car, which has been sold around 30 million times. It now has cult status.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Economically ecologicalThis documentation presents the development of sustainability in the automotive industry. The latest research and environmentally friendly concepts at the car shows are presented and various aspects are taken into account.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E22 — CruisingIn a tranquil village, a company assembles the coolest tricycles in the republic. With the quality seal "Made in Germany", the small company has developed into Europe's leading trike manufacturer in just under 25 years.

programme.title: Australian Superbike Championship 2024
programme.desc: S4 E10 — Supersport 600, Morgan Park, QueenslandThe show reports on the Australian Superbike Championship.

programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium.

programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph.
